instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Smooth 'n' easy apple and pineapple with spirity spice.

name: Jack Rose Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Laird's Straight Bottled in Bond applejack
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An apple brandy sour sweetened with grenadine. Better when shaken with egg white.

name: Jackie O's Rose
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: In its simplest form this is a Daiquiri with added triple sec and rose water - or a Margarita with rum. Whatever, it's a good balance of sweet and sour.

name: Jade Garden
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Not too dry, nor too sweet, but tasty, balanced and refreshing.

name: Jalisco
ingredients: 2½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: It's amazing how well grapes combine with tequila.

name: Jamaican Sunset
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Made with vodka as a base this drink would be called a Madras. Overproof rum adds both strength and flavour.

name: Ja-Mora
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Ja-mora of this fruity champagne cocktail you drink, ja-mora you'll like it.

name: Japanese Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
¾ shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Lightly sweetened and diluted cognac flavoured with almond and a hint of spice.

name: Japanese Slipper
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A melon Margarita.

name: Jasmine
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This bittersweet riff on the Pegu Club will appeal to drinkers who have acquired the taste for Campari.

name: Jean Gabin
instructions: POUR first three ingredients into glass. Add maple syrup and STIR until maple syrup dissolves.
comment: Beats hot chocolate as a nightcap.

name: Jean Marc
ingredients: ¼ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE mint and ginger in base of shaker. Add next two ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with Appletiser, stir and serve with straws.
comment: Chartreuse combines well with apple, ginger and mint in this summertime drink.

name: Jelly Belly Beany
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: It's a sweetie but you're going to enjoy chewing on it.

name: Jenever Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: One of the more delicately flavoured sours.

name: Jerez
ingredients: 1 shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
1 shot La Vieille Prune plum brandy
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sherry depth and stoned fruit flavours.

name: Jockey Club
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Peachy almond with gin.

name: John Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, stir and serve with straws.
garnish: Orange slice & Luxardo Maraschino cherry on stick (sail)
comment: A refreshing balance of sour lemon and sugar, laced with gin and lengthened with soda.

name: Arnaud Martini
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An interesting balance of blackcurrant, vermouth and gin. Sweet palate and dry finish.

name: Jolt'ini
ingredients: 1¾ shot Ketel One Vodka (infused with vanilla)
instructions:
1. To make a great tasting Jolt'ini you’ll first need to flavour your vodka with a vanilla pod. Simply cut the vanilla pod lengthways to expose the flavoursome seeds inside and drop the whole vanilla pod into your bottle of vodka. Reseal and shake bottle several times a day for at least two days, preferably a week.

2. To make your cocktail, SHAKE your vanilla infused vodka and other ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A flavoursome wakeup call of espresso coffee laced with vanilla vodka.

name: Jose Collins
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glasses. TOP with soda, stir and serve with straws.
comment: The classic long balance of sweet and sour with tequila adding Mexican spirit.

name: The Journalist
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Like some journalists I've met, this gin Martini is bitter and sour.

name: Jules Delight
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet fortified strawberries with a cleansing balsamic vinegar bite.

name: Jungle Bird
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Demerara sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Bittersweet and fruity with pungent rum notes.

name: The Juxtaposition
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: STIR honey with vodka in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tangy, complex and smoothed by foaming pineapple.

name: Kamikaze
ingredients: 1 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A bite-sized Margarita.

name: Asian Ginger Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Lightly spiced with ginger, distinctly oriental in character.

name: Kava
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A wonderfully fruity, fluffy and kitsch Tiki drink.

name: Kee-Wee Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut kiwi fruit in half, scoop out flesh into base of shaker and MUDDLE. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The citrus hints in the kiwi combine brilliantly with those in the gin and fresh lemon juice.

name: Asian Mary
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker and add vodka. Squeeze wasabi paste onto bar spoon and STIR with vodka and ginger until dissolved. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: An aptly named Bloody Mary with plenty of Asian spice.

name: Key Lime
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients without ice and serve.
comment: Tangy, smooth and rich! Alcoholic ice-cream for grown-ups.

name: Key Lime Pie #1
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Lightly spiced vanilla liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled, rimmed glass. SHAKE cream and Licor 43 without ice so as to mix and whip. FLOAT cream mix on surface of drink.
comment:
This extremely rich drink is great when served as a dessert alternative.
To make the pie rim, wipe outside edge of rim with cream mix and dip into crunched up Graham Cracker or digestive biscuits.

name: Key Lime Pie #2
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled, rimmed glass. To make the pie rim, wipe outside edge of rim with cream mix and dip into crunched up Graham Cracker or digestive biscuits.
comment: Beautiful balance of pineapple, vanilla, sweet and sour.

name: Key Lime Pie #3
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled, rimmed glass.
comment:
My favourite rendition of this dessert-in-a-glass cocktail.
To make the pie rim - wipe with cream mix and dip into crushed Graham Crackers or digestive biscuits.

name: Kir Royale Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: POUR cassis into glass and TOP with champagne.
comment: Champagne replaces Bourgogne Aligoté white wine in this 'Royal' rendition of Mayor Canon Kir's classic aperitif. Easy to make, easy to drink.

name: Kiwi Bellini
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: Cut kiwi in half, scoop out flesh into base of shaker and MUDDLE. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with prosecco.
comment: Lemon fresh kiwi, fortified with vodka and charged with prosecco.

name: Kiwi Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Cut kiwi fruit in half, scoop out flesh into base of shaker and MUDDLE. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda water.
comment: A fruity adaptation of a Vodka Collins.

name: Kiwi Crush
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: Cut kiwi fruit in half, scoop out flesh into base of shaker and MUDDLE. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spirit laced kiwi, citrus and almond.

name: Kiwi Cocktail (simple)
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut kiwi fruit in half, scoop out flesh into base of shaker and MUDDLE. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: You may need to adjust the sugar depending on the ripeness of your fruit.

name: Knickerbocker Special
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet and very fruity with raspberry and pineapple to the fore. Made with freshly prepared homemade raspberry syrup (1½:1) this is particularly delicious.

name: Koi Yellow
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sherbet raspberry Martini with a sweet and citrus sour finish.

name: Kool Hand Luke
ingredients: 2 shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lime in base of glass to release juices. POUR other ingredients into glass, add crushed ice and CHURN (stir). Serve with straws.
comment: This looks like a Caipirinha and has a similar balance of sweet, sour and spirit. The bitters bring out the spice in the rum, which is every bit as pungent as cachaça.

name: Koolaid
ingredients: ¾ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Tangy liquid marzipan with hints of melon, cranberry and orange juice.

name: Krakow Tea
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint in base of shaker (just to bruise). SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Refreshing and floral with a dry, citrus finish.

name: Lavender & Black Pepper Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Le Sirop de Monin Lavandie - Lavender Sugar Syrup
instructions: Pour the syrup into an ice filled mixing glass. Add the vodka and black pepper. STIR and super-fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Subtly sweetened and lavender flavoured vodka, with a bump and grind of spicy pepper.

name: Lavender Martini
ingredients: 2½ shot Ketel One Vodka (infused with lavender)
¾ shot Giffard Parfait Amour Liqueur
¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Infusing lavender in liquor tends to make it bitter but the Parfait Amour adds sweetness as well as flavour and colour.

name: Lemon Beat
instructions: STIR honey with cachaça in the base of shaker to dissolve honey. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Simple but effective. Use quality cachaça and honey and you'll have a great drink.

name: Lemon Butter Cookie
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
⅛ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: An appropriate name for a most unusually flavoured drink modelled on the Polish Martini.

name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: Creamy and tangy - like a lemon pie. Consume in place of a dessert.

name: Lemon Curd Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This almost creamy cocktail is named after and tastes like its primary ingredient.

name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sherbety lemon - well balanced and very refreshing.

name: Lemon Meringue Martini
ingredients: 1 shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly creamy in consistency, this tangy lemon drink is indeed reminiscent of the eponymous dessert.

name: Lemon Meringue Pie'tini
ingredients: 1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Lightly spiced vanilla liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled and rimmed glass. DRY SHAKE cream and Licor 43 (without ice) so as to mix and whip. FLOAT cream by pouring over back of spoon.
garnish: Pie rim - wipe outside edge of rim with cream mix and dip into crunched up Graham Cracker or digestive biscuits.
comment: Rich and syrupy base sipped through a vanilla cream topping.

name: Lemon Sorbet
ingredients: ½ cupful Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: Heat water in pan and add sugar. Simmer and stir until sugar dissolves, add lemon juice and grated lemon rind and continue to simmer and stir for a few minutes. Take off the heat and allow to cool. Fine strain into a shallow container and stir in liqueur and orange bitters. Beat egg whites and fold into mix. Place in freezer and store for up to 3-4 days before use.
comment: Our favourite recipe for this dessert and occasional cocktail ingredient.

name: Lemony
ingredients: ½ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Lemon subtly dominates this complex, herbal drink.

name: Leninade
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) and lemon slice
comment: Orange undertones add citrus depth to the lemon explosion.

name: Lime Sour
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Fresh egg white gives this drink a wonderfully frothy top and smooths the alcohol and lime juice.

name: Limeade (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: 1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A superbly refreshing alternative to lemonade.

name: Limey Cosmo
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: If you like Cosmopolitans, you'll love this zesty alternative.

name: Limey Mule
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Made with plain vodka this drink is a Moscow Mule. This variant uses lime flavoured vodka.

name: Livingstone
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The classic gin and vermouth Martini made more approachable with a dash of sugar.

name: Long Island Lemonade
ingredients: ½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 7 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with lemonade. Serve with a stirrer.
comment: Surprising dry with sharp zesty citrus, laced with 4 different white spirits and triple sec liqueur, lengthened with lemonade.

name: Long Island Iced Tea Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE first 8 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with cola.
comment: A cooling, combination of four different white spirits, triple sec, lemon and lime, crowned with a splash of cola.

name: Long Island Spiced Tea
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi OakHeart Spiced Rum
½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 7 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with cola, stir and serve with straws.
comment: A contemporary spicy twist on the American classic Long Island Iced Tea.

name: Lotus Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This violet coloured drink may have an unlikely list of ingredients, but definitely tastes great.

name: Acapulco Daiquiri
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: DRY SHAKE (without ice) all ingredients to emulsify. Add ice, SHAKE again and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A smooth, yet citrus-rich Daiquiri.

name: Aunt Emily
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
⅛ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Aunt Emily is onto something as these ingredients combine to make a stylish fruity Martini.

name: Lux Daiquiri
ingredients: 3 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Maraschino syrup (from cherry jar)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with one 12oz scoop of crushed ice and serve in chilled glass.
comment: A classic frozen Daiquiri heavily laced with maraschino cherry.

name: Luxury Mojito
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: MUDDLE mint in glass with sugar and lime juice. Fill glass with crushed ice, add rum, Angostura and champagne, then stir.
comment: A Mojito made with aged rum and topped with champagne instead of soda water: more complex than the original.

name: Lychee & Blackcurrant Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Kwai Feh lychee liqueur
¾ scoop Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light, fragrant and laced with gin.

name: Lychee & Rose Petal Martini
ingredients: 2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light pink in colour and subtle in flavour.

name: Lychee & Sake Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Kwai Feh lychee liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Mellow in style with subtle hints of sake and lychee.

name: Lychee Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Kwai Feh lychee liqueur
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: If you like lychee you'll love this delicate Martini.

name: Auntie's Hot Xmas Punch
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
4 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: POUR all ingredients into glass and stir. MICROWAVE for a minute (vary time depending on your microwave oven), stir again and serve.
comment: Hot, raisiny and Christmas pudding-like. Serve with a mince pie.

name: Mae West cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A rosé coloured, semi-sweet concoction with a cherry, chocolate flavour.

name: Autumn Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An easy drinking, smooth, fruity cocktail with grassy hints courtesy of bison vodka.

name: Mai Tai (Beaumont-Gantt's recipe)
ingredients: 1½ shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice

name: Mainbrace
ingredients: 1¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tangy grapefruit laced with gin and a hint of orange. Tart finish.

name: Malcom Lowry
ingredients: 1 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A suitably 'hard' and flavoursome Daiquiri-like drink.

name: Mandarine Sidecar
ingredients: 1 shot Mandarine Napoleon Grande Liqueur Imperiale
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Wonderfully tart and strong in flavour.

name: Mandarito
ingredients: 1½ shot Mandarine Napoleon Grande Liqueur Imperiale
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of glass. Add next 4 ingredients, half fill glass with crushed ice and CHURN (stir). Fill glass to brim with more crushed ice and churn some more. TOP with soda, stir and serve with straws.
comment: A vodka Mojito with mandarine accents.

name: Mango Collins
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, stir and serve with straws.
comment: Lemon juice and gin combine with mango in this refreshing tall drink.

name: Mango Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tropical yet potent and refreshing.

name: Mango Margarita (served 'straight up')
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The character of the tequila is not overwhelmed by the fruit.

name: Mango Margarita (frozen)
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 6oz scoop of crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: Mango first and Margarita second.

name: Mango Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This drink doesn't work nearly so well with plain vodka - if citrus vodka is not available, try using gin.

name: Mango Punch
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: A distinctly tropical cocktail flavoured with mango.

name: Marama Rum Punch
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise). Add next five ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with lemonade, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: A tangy, well-balanced punch.

name: Margarita (frozen)
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Serve heaped in the glass and with straws.
comment: Citrus freshness with the subtle agave of tequila served frozen.

name: Marguerite Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An equal parts (Fifty-Fifty) Dry Martini with a hint of orange due to the use of orange curaçao, orange bitters and an orange zest twist.

name: Maria Theresa Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: STIR honey with tequila in base of shaker to dissolve honey. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Originally sweetened with sugar syrup, this is better smoothed with honey.

name: Marmalade Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR marmalade with gin in base of shaker so as to dissolve marmalade. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Harry wrote of his own drink, "By its bitter-sweet taste this cocktail is especially suited to be a luncheon apertif."

name: Marmarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Margarita with a Marmite rim. After all, yeast extract is slightly salty.

name: Martini Thyme
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE thyme in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A wonderfully fresh herbal Martini with the distinctive taste of Chartreuse. You'll either love it or hate it.

name: Mary Rose
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE rosemary in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Herbal, herbal and herbal with a hint of spice.

name: Matador #1
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A long Margarita-style drink.The lime and tequila work wonders with the pineapple.

name: Mauresque
ingredients: 1 shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
1 shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: POUR absinthe and almond syrup into glass. Serve iced water separately in a small jug (known in France as a 'broc') so the customer can dilute to their own taste (I recommend five shots). Lastly, add ice to fill glass.
comment: Long, refreshing aniseed, liquorice and almond.

name: Mayan Whore
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, DO NOT STIR and serve with straws.
comment: An implausible ménage à trois: coffee, tequila and pineapple, served long.

name: Mayfair Cocktail #1
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE cloves in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spiced apricot laced with gin. Slightly sweet.

name: Maxim's Coffee (Hot)
instructions: POUR all ingredients into warmed glass and STIR.
comment: An interesting herbal cognac laced coffee.

name: Aviator #1
ingredients: ½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. POUR cassis into centre of drink (it should sink).
comment: An Aviation with egg white and a dash of cassis in the bottom but is actually better and more balanced when the cassis is shaken with the other ingredients.

name: Melon Collie Martini
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Something of a holiday disco drink but tasty all the same.

name: Melon Daiquiri #1 (served 'up')
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut melon into 8 segments and deseed. Cut cubes of flesh from skin of one segment and MUDDLE in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classic Daiquiri with the gentle touch of melon.

name: Melon Daiquiri #2 (served frozen)
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Cut melon into 8 segments and deseed. Cut cubes of flesh from skin of one segment and place in blender. Add other ingredients and BLEND with half scoop of crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: A cooling, fruity Daiquiri.

name: Melon Margarita #1 (served 'up')
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: Cut melon into 8 segments and deseed. Cut cubes of flesh from skin of one segment and MUDDLE in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Looks like stagnant pond water but tastes fantastic.

name: Awol
ingredients: ½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: LAYER in chilled glass by carefully pouring ingredients in the following order. Then FLAME drink and allow to burn for no more than ten seconds before extinguishing flame and consuming. Take extreme care and beware of hot glass.
comment: A strong but surprisingly palatable shot.

name: Melon Martini (fresh fruit)
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut melon into eight segments and deseed. Cut cubes of flesh from skin of one segment and MUDDLE in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Probably the most popular of all the fresh fruit martinis.

name: Meloncholy Martini
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet, but the flavours in this smooth, tangy, lime-green drink combine surprisingly well.

name: Menehune Juice
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: Slightly sweet and strong. According to Vic, "One sip and you may see a Menehune."

name: Mesa Fresca
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
3 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sweet and sour tequila and grapefruit.

name: Merry-Go-Round Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Chilled olive on stick or lemon zest twist
comment: Stir this 'perfect' Martini around and then get merry.

name: Azure Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A tangy cocktail that's reminiscent of a cinnamon laced apple pie. Shame it's not blue.

name: Mexican
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh pineapple makes this drink.

name: Mexican 55
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Suitably hard, yet surprisingly refreshing and sophisticated.

name: Mexican Manhattan
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: You've tried this with bourbon, now surprise yourself with an aged tequila.

name: Mexican Surfer
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Frothy topped, easy to make, and all too easy to drink.

name: Miami Beach
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fruity and well proportioned - like the babes on Miami Beach. Sorry.

name: Miami Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Giffard Menthe Pastille white crème de menthe liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The merest hint of mint in a refreshing Daiquiri with a dry finish.

name: Milano Sour
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Delicate anise and peppermint with citrus freshness.

name: Milk Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Goslings Black Seal Rum
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: The cream, vanilla and sugar tame the cognac and rum.

name: Million Dollar Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Lemon zest twist (discarded) & pineapple wedge on rim
comment: Serious, yet superbly smooth and a bit fluffy.

name: Milly Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE basil (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin and pineapple with a pleasing hint of basil.

name: Mimosa
instructions: POUR half the champagne into ice-filled glass (preferably a chunk of block ice), then POUR orange juice and finally the rest of the champagne.
comment: Great when made with freshly squeezed orange juice, this cocktail is very similar to the Buck's Fizz, which tends to have a higher proportion of Champagne. Also see the Grand Mimosa, basically the same drink charged with orange liqueur.

name: Mint Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Exactly what the name promises.

name: Mitch Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: One of London's contemporary classics. Far from a proper Martini, this is fruity and sweet, but not overly so.

name: Mojito de Casa
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of glass. Add tequila, lime juice and sugar. Half fill glass with crushed ice and CHURN (stir) with bar spoon. Fill glass with more crushed ice and churn some more. TOP with soda, stir and serve.
comment: A tequila based Mojito.

name: Momisette
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
Top up with Sparkling mineral water
instructions: POUR pastis and almond syrup into glass. Serve with bottle of sparkling water so the customer can dilute to their own taste. (I recommend five shots.) Lastly, add ice to fill glass.
comment: Complex balance of anis, almond and liquorice.

name: Momo Special
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add next 3 ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Enrich the minty flavour by macerating the mint in the vodka some hours before making.

name: Mona Lisa
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: Chartreuse fans will appreciate this drink, which is also an approachable way for novices to acquire a taste for the green stuff.

name: Monarch Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Wonderfully floral and minty - worthy of a right royal drinker.

name: Monkey Gland #2
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A somewhat off-putting name for a very palatable cocktail.

name: Monkey Shine
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The sweet, tropical fruitiness of this drink is set off by the spicy rim.

name: Monza
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: If you like Campari you'll love this.

name: Morning Glory
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sophisticated and complex - one for sipping.

name: Moscow Mule
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled mug/glass. TOP with crushed ice.
comment: A long, vodka based drink with spice provided by ginger beer and Angostura.

name: Motox
instructions: MUDDLE ginger and coriander in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Each sip is fruity, lemon fresh and followed by a hot ginger hit.

name: Mudslide
ingredients: 1½ shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with a 12oz scoop of crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: A simply scrumptious dessert drink with whiskey cream and coffee.

name: Mujer Verde
ingredients: ½ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The name means 'Green Lady'... and she packs a Chartreuse punch.

name: Mulled Wine
ingredients: 1½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: POUR ingredients into pre-warmed glass and stir.
comment: Warming, soothing and potent. Better if several servings are made at the same time and the ingredients mixed together and warmed in a saucepan.

name: B & B
instructions: STIR ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Honeyed and spiced cognac.

name: Hotel Nacional Daiquiri No.1
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sophisticated complex apricot Daiquiri.

name: Naranja Daiquiri
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The Latino version of an orange Daiquiri.

name: Navigator
ingredients: 1¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This fruity, grapefruit-led drink is pleasantly bitter and sour.

name: Navy Grog
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: STIR honey with rum in base of shaker to dissolve honey. Add next 3 ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: An extremely drinkable, honeyed cocktail.

name: Negus (Hot)
ingredients: 3 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Place bar spoon in warmed glass. POUR all ingredients into glass and STIR.
comment: A tangy, citrusy hot drink.

name: Nice Pear
ingredients: ½ shot Poire William eau de vie
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spirited, rich and fruity.

name: Nicky Finn
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Basically a Sidecar spiked with an aniseedy dash of Pernod.

name: Nine-20-Seven
ingredients: ¼ shot Lightly spiced vanilla liqueur
instructions: POUR ingredients into chilled glass and lightly stir.
comment: Champagne with a hint of vanilla.

name: Noon
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This classic cocktail is smooth and aromatic.

name: Northern Lights
ingredients: ¾ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Wonderfully refreshing: apple and anis served up on a grassy vodka base.

name: North Pole Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. FLOAT cream over drink.
comment: An Aviation smoothed by egg white and cream.

name: Nome
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This dyslexic gnome is dry and interesting.

name: Nuts & Berries
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: The inclusion of a carbonate (lemonade) may annoy some classical bartenders but it adds flavour, sweetness and dilution.

name: Opal Café
ingredients: ½ shot Espresso coffee (freshly made & hot)
instructions: SHAKE first two ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. FLOAT thin layer of cream over drink.
comment: A great liquorice and coffee drink to sip or shoot.

name: Opera
ingredients: ¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dubonnet smoothes the gin while maraschino adds floral notes.

name: Orang-A-Tang
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. FLOAT layer of rum over drink.
comment: Orange predominates in this long, tangy, topical cooler.

name: Bahama Mama
ingredients: ¾ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A tropical, fruity number laced with flavoursome rum.

name: Orange Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sophisticated, complex balance of orange and gin.

name: Oriental Grape Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sake adds some oriental intrigue to what would otherwise be a plain old grape cocktail.

name: Oriental Tart
ingredients: 2 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sour, tart, fruity cocktail with more than a hint of lychee.

name: Osmo
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sake based Cosmopolitan.

name: Pago Pago Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE pineapple in base of shaker. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Pineapple Daiquiri with two liqueurs giving a herbal chocolate influence.

name: Pall Mall Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classic Martini served 'perfect' with the tiniest hint of chocolate.

name: Bajan Mojito
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Passoa 'The Passion Drink' Liqueur
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop flesh into glass. Add mint and gently MUDDLE (just to bruise mint). Add rum, lime juice and crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink in glass to mix. DRIZZLE passion fruit liqueur and serve with straws.
comment: A laid-back fruity, slightly sweet Mojito.

name: Pancho Villa
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
¼ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: To quote Victor Bergeron, "This'll tuck you away neatly - and pick you up and throw you right to the floor".

name: Paradise #1
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange predominates in this strong complex cocktail.

name: Bajan Passion
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Daiquiri laced with fruit and spice.

name: Parisian Martini #1
ingredients: 1¼ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Full-on rich cassis is barely tempered by gin and dry vermouth.

name: Parisian Spring Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne and serve with straws.
comment: Dry apple and champagne - like upmarket cider.

name: Park Avenue
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Very fruity and well-balanced rather than dry or sweet.

name: Parma Negroni
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Negroni drinkers will love this fruity adaptation.

name: Passion Fruit Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, stir and serve with straws.
comment: This fruity adaptation of the classic Collins may be a tad sharp for some: if so, add a dash more sugar.

name: Passion Fruit Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The rum character comes through in this tropically fruity cocktail.

name: Passion Fruit Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The flavour of tequila is very evident in this fruity adaptation.

name: Passion Fruit Cocktail #3
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Float half passion fruit or physalis (cape gooseberry) on rim
comment: Simple but tasty, harnessing the flavour of passion fruit.

name: Passion Fruit Cocktail #2
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fruity, easy drinking concoction.

name: Passion Fruit Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Full-on passion fruit with gin and citrus.

name: Passion Fruit Rum Punch
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add next four ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) and then top with champagne
comment: Rum and fruit combine in this punchy tropical style drink.

name: Planteur
ingredients: 2 shot Clément Canne Bleue 2016 Martinique Rhum blanc Agricole
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Handle with extreme care.

name: Balalaika
ingredients: 1¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Richly flavoured with orange and lemon.

name: Peach Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classic Daiquiri with hint of peach liqueur.

name: Pear & Cardamom Sidecar
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE cardamom in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A wonderful meld of aromatic ingredients.

name: Pear & Elderflower Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Pear and elderflower fortified with vodka.

name: Pear Drop Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Poire William eau de vie
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Not as sticky as the sweet it takes its name from but full-on tangy pear.

name: Achilles Heel
ingredients: ¼ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: If you like French Martinis you'll love this semi-sweet Tatanka.

name: Pedro Collins
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: This rum based Tom Collins is basically a long Daiquiri with soda.

name: Pegu Club #1
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: We've added a dash of sugar to the original recipe to reduce the tartness of this gin based Margarita-like concoction. However, we prefer our version of the Pegu Club.

name: Pendennis Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
1 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tangy, subtle, sweet, and sour.

name: Peppered Mary
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A Bloody Mary with sweet and spicy pepper.

name: Perfect Alibi
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A very unusual and pleasant mix of flavours.

name: Perfect John
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A straight up Harvey Wallbanger with triple sec.

name: Periodista Daiquiri
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Basically an orange and apricot Daiquiri.

name: Perry Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Poire William eau de vie
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Pear with a hint of sparkle.

name: Pharmaceutical Stimulant
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A real wake-up call and the drink that led to many an Espresso Martini.

name: Pierre Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: A Tom Collins made with cognac. The cognac's character shines through.

name: Pimm's Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
garnish: Lemon & orange zest twists (discarded) & strawberry on rim
comment: Luxuriate in this quintessentially English tipple.

name: Pimm's Cup (or Classic Pimm's)
instructions: POUR Pimm's into glass half filled with ice. Add fruit and fill glass with more ice. TOP with equal parts lemonade and ginger ale (or just use lemonade, or ginger ale). Lightly stir prior to serving.
comment: You've not properly experienced an English summer until you've drunk one of these whilst sheltering from the rain.

name: Piña Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich pineapple but not too sweet.

name: Pineapple & Ginger Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Smooth, rich pineapple flavour with hints of vodka and ginger

name: Pineapple Fizz
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain in chilled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir before serving.
comment: A Pineapple Daiquiri lengthened with soda. You'll be surprised just how tasty and refreshing this drink is.

name: Pineapple Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Tequila Margarita with a pineapple fruit kick

name: Pink Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The quality of the pomegranate syrup will make or break this delicate Daiquiri.

name: Pink Gin
ingredients: 1 shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This is a drink that likes dilution and I’d aim for around almost equal parts  water and gin after stirring with ice. A spoon full of sugar certainly helps the medicine go down where the Pink Gin is concerned and the use of Old Tom gin is worth considering. However, the more sugar you add the less dilution you’ll need. Hit the perfect balance and this is a great drink, but it’s an equilibrium that’s tricky to attain.

name: Pink Grapefruit Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass
comment: Delivers exactly what the name promises.

name: Pink Hound
ingredients: 1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A flavoursome balance of sweet and sour.

name: Baltic Spring Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE peach in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sweet and fruity with champagne sparkle. It's peachy!

name: Pino Pepe
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop crushed ice. POUR into glass (or pineapple shell) and serve with straws. If using a pineapple shell, serve with ice cubes.
comment: To quote Trader Vic, "Lethal but smooth - pineapple at its best".

name: Pirate Daiquiri
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Why the name? Well, the rums are hard and nautical, the lime protects against scurvy, the liqueur contains gold and the syrup is red as blood.

name: Pisco Collins
ingredients: 2 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: The most aromatic and flavoursome of the Collins family.

name: Pisco Punch (Lannes' recipe)
ingredients: 2½ shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with soda.
comment: Pisco's character shines through the sweetened pineapple fruit in this long, refreshing classic.

name: Planter's Punch
ingredients: 1½ shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A tangy punch which harnesses the rich flavours of Myers's rum.

name: Playa del Mar
ingredients: 1 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fruity complex taste with a hint of tequila. The name translates as a 'Beach of the Sea' and this is a riff on a 'Sex on the Beach'.

name: Bamboo (with triple sec)
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: For sophisticated dry palates - a touch of triple sec takes the dry edge off of fino sherry and dry vermouth.

name: Plum Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: CUT plum into quarters, remove stone and peel. MUDDLE plum in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Depending on the ripeness of the plums, you may need to adjust the quantity of sugar.

name: Plum Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE plum in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Soft, ripe plums are key to this fruity sour.

name: Pogo Stick
ingredients: ½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: To quote Trader Vic, "A refreshing blend of gin with pineapple and grapefruit juice... a real romper".

name: Pomegranate Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This drink was originally based on gin but we find that juniper and pomegranate clash.

name: Pompanski Martini
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry and zesty with the sharp freshness of grapefruit and a hint of orange.

name: Ponce de Leon
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A well-balanced classic champagne cocktail.

name: Poncha
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: STIR honey with aguardiente base of shaker to dissolve honey. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice filled glass.
comment: This citrus refresher is reputedly an excellent cold remedy.

name: Pontberry Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A light, fruity, easy drinking cocktail.

name: President
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A delicately fruity orange Daiquiri.

name: Presidente
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with crushed ice and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: Bone dry, light and delicate. The sweetness and colour of the maraschino cherry garnish makes this drink.

name: Prickly Pear Mule
ingredients: 1¼ shot Poire William eau de vie
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer.
comment: Subtle pear with ginger spice. Fill the glass with ice and go easy on the ginger beer which can predominate and overpower the pear.

name: Banana Boomer
ingredients: 1 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fortified bubble gum for the young at heart.

name: Prince Charlie
ingredients: ¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac and honey with sweet and sourness in harmony.

name: Prince of Wales
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: RUB sugar cube with lemon zest, coat with dashes of bitters and drop cube into chilled glass. POUR chilled cognac and liqueur over soaked cube and TOP with chilled champagne.
comment: More interesting than a Classic Champagne Cocktail.

name: Princess Marina
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicate yet loaded with alcohol and flavour.

name: Princess Mary
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet, very creamy - drink after dinner.

name: Princeton
ingredients: ⅙ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment:
Kappeler’s 1895 recipe calls for the old tom gin and orange bitters to be stirred with ice and strained into a glass, with tawny port poured down the side of the glass so it settles to form a red layer beneath the orange bitters tinted gin.

We’ve added a spoon (5ml) of sugar syrup to Kappeler’s recipe to slightly sweeten the gin (omit if using a sweet old tom) and a splash of water to add some much needed dilution. We also prefer to abandon the original layering and stir all the ingredients together.

name: Princeton Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The Dry Martini meets the Gimlet. They should meet more often.

name: Pruneaux
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¾ shot Prune syrup (from tinned fruit)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sherried prunes further fortified by gin.

name: Banana Colada
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 6oz scoop of crushed ice and serve with paper straws.
comment: Don't skimp, use a whole banana per drink for real flavour.

name: P.S. I Love You
ingredients: ¾ shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
¾ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
¾ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. SHAKE again without ice (dry shake) and strain into chilled glass.
comment: P.S. You'll love this creamy, slightly sweet dessert cocktail.

name: Purple Cosmo
ingredients: ¾ shot Giffard Parfait Amour Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: If shaken this becomes more of grey cosmo. The flavour and colour make for an interesting twist.

name: Purple Flirt #1
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This purple drink is surprisingly balanced with subtle hints of liquorice.

name: Purple Pear Martini
ingredients: ¾ shot Poire William eau de vie
¾ shot Créme de violette liqueur
1 shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This floral drink suits its name.

name: Quarter Deck
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Hints of prune, toffee and maple syrup. Very complex.

name: Quarterback
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This white, creamy drink has a flavoursome bite.

name: Queen Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A 'perfectly' fruity Martini that's fit for a....

name: Quince Sour
instructions: STIR quince jam with vodka in base of shaker to dissolve jam. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The sweet quince both flavours and balances the sour.

name: Randy
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
1½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Named after the London rhyming slang for port and brandy, its base ingredients. The love interest comes courtesy of orange and vanilla.

name: Raspberry Caipirinha
instructions:
1. Cut lime in half (from pole to pole) and then slice one of the halves into eight 3-4mm thick half-moon shaped segments and drop into the base of a robust rocks glass.

2. Add 3 bar spoons caster sugar (or ½oz / 15ml sugar syrup 2:1) and MUDDLE.

3. Add raspberries and MUDDLE some more.

4. When sure fruit juice is fully extracted and the sugar dissolved, transfer the muddled fruit and sugar into serving glass (preferably a 30cl / 10oz hi-ball glass).

5. POUR cachaça (stored in the freezer) into the rocks glass (used to muddle) and swirl to rinse glass before pouring cachaça into serving glass. STIR to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.

6. Crack (rather than crush) four to five large ice cubes and drop into serving glass. STIR before topping with more ice and serve with a stirrer (but no straws).
garnish: Stirrer (spoon, wooden lolly stick or stick cut from sugar cane)
comment: A fruity twist on the popular Caipirinha.

name: Raspberry Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add next five ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: This fruity drink is the most popular modern adaptation of the classic Collins.

name: Raspberry Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Just as it says - a raspberry flavoured Margarita.

name: Raspberry Cocktail #2
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Great raspberry flavour integrated with gin.

name: Raspberry Mocha'tini
ingredients: ¾ shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
¾ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet chocolate and raspberry tempered by dry coffee and vodka.

name: Raspberry Mule
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: The fruity alternative to a Moscow Mule.

name: Bananas & Cream
ingredients: 2 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
1 shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve with straws.
