comment: Banana and cream frappé with hints of almond. One for a summer afternoon.

name: Ray's Hard Lemonade
ingredients: 1½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of shaker. Add next 4 ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Alcoholic lemonade with mint? A vodka mojito? However you describe it, it works.

name: Banoffee Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Teichenné Butterscotch Schnapps Liqueur
¾ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE banana in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Thick and rich, one for after the cheese course.

name: Real Lemonade (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: 1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR ingredients in ice-filled  glass and lightly STIR. Serve with straws.
comment: The classic English summertime refresher.

name: Red Angel
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A subtly flavoured cocktail with a dry, almost tannic edge.

name: Red Lion (Tarling's recipe)
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange juice and sugar coated rim
comment: This gin and Grand Marnier based citrusy cocktail is deliberately, and indeed originally, formulated to be a tad on the sour side, but is balanced by a luxuriant sugar crusted rim. You may also be interested in trying our modern adaption of the Red Lion.

name: Red Rover
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Carpet-scaring red with the body of red wine but the palate of a cocktail.

name: Reef Juice
ingredients: 1 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Tangy, fruity and dangerously moreish.

name: Resolute
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Simple but tasty. All three flavours work in harmony.

name: Rhett Butler
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A simple and well-balanced classic drink.

name: Rhubarb & Custard Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: As sharp, sweet, creamy and flavourful as the dessert it imitates.

name: Rhubarb & Honey Bellini
ingredients: Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: SHAKE rhubarb syrup and honey liqueur with ice  and fine strain into chille glass. TOP with Prosecco and gently stir.
comment: The implausible combination works surprisingly well.

name: Ribalaigua Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This unusual Daiquiri leads with sweet maraschino and finishes with sour grapefruit.

name: Gin Rickey
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: Clean, sharp and refreshing.

name: Ritz Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR first four ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with a splash of champagne.
comment: Citrus freshness with a cognac backbone, lightened and dried with champagne.

name: The Roadrunner
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila (infused with vanilla)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Citrus and tequila with a hint of maple and vanilla, smoothed with egg white.

name: Robin Hood #1
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1¼ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: American readers might consider this a Apple Martini based on rum.

name: Rocky Mountain Rootbeer
instructions: POUR vodka and liqueur into ice-filled glass, TOP up with cola and lightly stir.
comment: Does indeed taste reminiscent of alcoholic root beer.

name: The Roffignac
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first two ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: This bright red, fruity drink is simple but moreish.

name: Roman Punch
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink and top up ice if necessary. Serve with straws. (If serving with cubed rather than crushed ice add 1½ shots of chilled water before shaking.
comment: Spirited and refreshing with herbal notes.

name: La Rosa Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fruity yet dry crimson-coloured Margarita

name: Rosarita Margarita
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This peachy coloured Margarita is well-balanced and flavoursome.

name: Rose Petalini
ingredients: 3 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Peychaud's bitters give this fragrant cocktail a delicate pink hue.

name: Rossini
ingredients: ¾ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add liqueur, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with prosecco and gently stir.
comment: Strawberries seem to complement prosecco even better than white peaches so perhaps order this in preference to a Bellini.

name: Rosy Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An aptly named drink with hints of spice, citrus peel, honey and mulled wine.

name: Roulette
ingredients: ¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Balanced apple and spice.

name: Royal Bermuda Yacht Club Daiquiri
ingredients: 2½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A full-flavoured, tangy Daiquiri.

name: Royal Cosmopolitan
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: The classic Cosmopolitan with a layer of fizz on top adding a biscuity complexity. Sex And The City meets Ab Fab.

name: Ruby Martini #1
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sour, citrus-led variation on the Cosmopolitan.

name: Rude Ginger Cosmopolitan
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add the other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: To quote Halo's cocktail list, the bar where we discovered this drink, "Looks like a cosmo, goes like a Mexican!"

name: Rumba
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: To quote Embury, "Whoever thought up this snootful of liquid dynamite certainly liked his liquor hard!"

name: Rum Runner
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
1 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Fruity, sharp and rounded.

name: Rum Sour
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Smooth and sour - well balanced.

name: Russian Bride
ingredients: ¼ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A little on the sweet side for some but vanilla, coffee and chocolate smoothed with cream is a tasty combination.

name: Sage Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) sage in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Exactly as promised - a sage flavoured Margarita.

name: Sage Cocktail
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) sage in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicate sage and a hint of apple, dried with vermouth and fortified with vodka.

name: St Kitts (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Rust coloured and refreshing.

name: Sake'Politan
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Cosmo with more than a hint of sake.

name: Sake-Tini #1
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sake and a hint of orange liqueur add the perfect aromatic edge to this Martini-style cocktail.

name: Sake-Tini #2
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Salmon-coloured, light and fragrant with plum wine and sake to the fore.

name: Salty Dog
ingredients: ⅙ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
2½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: For a more interesting drink, try basing this classic on gin rather than vodka.

name: Salty Lychee Martini
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light pink in colour and subtle in flavour with the salty tang of Fino sherry.

name: Sandstorm
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A long, fruity drink featuring well balanced sweet and sourness.

name: Bartender's Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This classic cocktail resembles an aromatic Martini. Hints of sherry and orange are followed by a dry finish.

name: La Sang
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The tannin in the wine balances the fruit and sweetness nicely.

name: Sangaree (Sangria)
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
1 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first six ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and lightly stir. Serve with straws.
comment: Basically just red wine and orange liqueur, diluted with water, lemon juice and sugar. But tasty!

name: Sangria Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Brandy based and fruit laced - just like it's namesake.

name: Satsuma Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tastes like its namesake - hard to believe it's almost half apple.

name: Bartender's Root Beer
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: POUR first three ingredients into ice-filled glass and TOP with cola.
comment: Not quite the root of all evil, but tasty all the same.

name: Savoy Special #1
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Wonderfully dry and aromatic.

name: Scorpion
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz crushed ice and serve with straws
comment: Well-balanced, refreshing spirit and orange. Not sweet.

name: Screwdriver (D's recipe)
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR (preferably with a screwdriver) all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The temperature at which this drink is served and the freshness of the orange juice are crucial to its success, but it's perhaps better made into a Harvey Wallbanger.

name: Seabreeze (simple recipe)
ingredients: 1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment:
Few bartenders bother to shake this simple drink, instead they "build" by simply pouring ingredients into ice-filled glass and then briefly stirring to mix.

A layered version of the Seabreeze emerged and became popular in London during the 1990s.

name: '75' Cocktail (Vermeire's 1922 recipe)
ingredients: ⅙ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spirituous dry and fruity with the botanicals in the gin adding depth of flavour to the other fruity ingredients.

name: Basil Beauty
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop flesh into shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Pineapple and passion fruit laced with citrus vodka and infused with hints of lime, basil and coconut.

name: Showbiz
ingredients: ¾ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet cassis soured with grapefruit and fortified with vodka.

name: Silver Bullet
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅓ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Caraway and fennel flavour this unusual sweet 'n' sour drink.

name: Singapore Sling (using Old Tom gin)
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first six ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and lightly stir.
comment: Slightly on the dry and sour side, this is decidedly more complex than most Singapore Sling recipes.

name: Sleepy Hollow
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint in base of shaker (just to bruise). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: Hints of lemon and mint with gin and apricot fruit. Very refreshing.

name: Sloppy Joe
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Nicely balances sweet and sourness.

name: Smooth & Creamy
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¼ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy and moreish.

name: Snow White Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. Then DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The pineapple and egg white ensure that this delightful Daiquiri has an appropriately white frothy head.

name: Snyder Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry, hardcore and yet mellow.

name: Basil Grande
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries and basil leaves in shaker base. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass. Dust with black pepper.
comment: Fruity, with interest courtesy of the basil and a grind of pepper.

name: So-So Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This beautifully balanced, appley drink is so much more than so-so.

name: Sourpuss Martini
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A lime-green, flavoursome cocktail that balances sweet and sour.

name: South Beach
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An unusual bittersweet combination with a strong orange and almond flavour.

name: Basil Mary
ingredients: ½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A particularly spicy Mary with a herbal twist.

name: South China Breeze
ingredients: 3 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Orange and grapefruit with an oriental influence by way of lychee.

name: Sensation
ingredients: ¾ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh, fragrant and balanced.

name: Settle Petal
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An aptly named floral cocktail.

name: Sidecar Named Desire
ingredients: ¾ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Take a classic Sidecar and add some love interest - apples!

name: Sidekick
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich pear and orange with a stabilising hint of sour lime.

name: Singapore Sling (Baker's Formula)
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Lacks the citrus of other Singapore Slings but the strength of the gin and dilution cuts and so balances the sweetness of the liqueurs.

name: Sir Charles Punch
ingredients: 1 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Short but full of personality.

name: Sleeping Bison-Tini
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A light cocktail featuring a melange of subtle flavours.

name: Smartini
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Citrus with a crispy chocolate edge. A sweetie.

name: Snood Murdekin
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. FLOAT cream over drink.
comment: Moreish combination of coffee and raspberries topped with cream.

name: Snowball
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: POUR lemonade and lime juice into ice-filled glass and then the advocaat which will mostly sink though the other ingredients. Lightly stir to integrate while retaining the lemonade’s carbonation.
garnish: Lime zest twist or lime slice
comment: Fresh lime juice and lemonade freshens and invigorates creamy advocaat. Try our more luxurious D's Snowball recipe.

name: Southern Mint Cobbler
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: Very fruity and easy to drink.

name: Southside Royale
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with a splash of champagne.
comment: A White Lady with fresh mint and champagne

name: Sparkling Perry
ingredients: ¾ shot Poire William eau de vie
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne and lightly stir.
comment: Reminiscent of perry (pear cider).

name: Spencer Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: To quote Craddock, "Very mellifluous: has a fine and rapid action: for morning work."

name: Spiked Apple Cider (Hot)
instructions: MUDDLE cloves in base of shaker. Add cognac and apple juice. SHAKE without ice and fine strain into glass. WARM in microwave then FLOAT double cream over drink.
comment: Warming and lightly spiced under a creamy head.

name: Spritz Al Bitter (Campari Spritz)
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly STIR so as not to lose fizz.
comment: Basically, a Spritzer with a generous splash of Italian red bitter liqueur- dry and very refreshing.

name: Sputnik #2
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice filled glass.
comment: Orange, cognac and rum meld well. Fruity and refreshing.

name: Stanley Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Salmon pink and reminiscent of a Daiquiri with a splash of gin.

name: The Star
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Like many old classics, this drink needs dilution so stir until you're bored and thirsty.

name: Steep Flight
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: 'Apples and pears' is the cockney rhyming slang for stairs, hence the flavours in this particular flight.

name: Stinger
ingredients: ¾ shot Giffard Menthe Pastille white crème de menthe liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: Classically the Stinger is shaken and served straight-up in a chilled coupe. However, we think it makes for a more refreshing peppermint and cognac digestif when served over crushed ice.

name: Stork Club
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange and gin with a souring splash of lime juice.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Makes strawberries and cream appear very dull.

name: Strawberry Éclair
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Far from sophisticated but appropriately named.

name: Strawberry Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh strawberries combine well with tequila in this fruity margarita.

name: Strawberry Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich strawberries fortified with vodka and a hint of pepper spice.

name: Strawberry & Balsamic Mojito #1
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Balsamic vinegar of Modena (white)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fruity twist on the classic Mojito.

name: Beach Blonde
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve with straws.
comment: Fruity, creamy holiday drinking.

name: Summer Breeze
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Cranberry, apple and elderflower fortified with vodka.

name: Summer Rose Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
½ shot Kwai Feh lychee liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: STIR first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. POUR grenadine into the centre of the drink. This should settle to form a red layer in the base of the glass.
comment: Unless you've a sweet tooth don't mix the red and white layers - sip from the chocolate and lychee top and stop when you hit red.

name: Sundowner #1
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac and orange served straight-up.

name: Sundowner #2
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Subtle meld of summer and citrus flavours.

name: Sunshine Cocktail #2
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: More a sunset but fruity, flavoursome and well-balanced all the same.

name: Sunstroke
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
2 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fruity but balanced. One to sip in the shade.

name: Swamp Water
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Long and refreshing - the herbal taste of Chartreuse combined with the fruitiness of pineapple.

name: Beachcomber
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Daiquiri with the addition of a dash of triple sec and maraschino.

name: Tango Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Balanced and complex with hints of gin and orange.

name: Tango Cocktail (Bellagio recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot Passoa 'The Passion Drink' Liqueur
2 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Floral and balanced.

name: Tantris Sidecar No.1
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¼ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Sidecar with extra interest courtesy of Chartreuse, pineapple and Calvados.

name: Tarte Tatin Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. Separately, SHAKE cream and egg white with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and carefully pour over back of spoon so as to LAYER over drink.
comment: A creamy top hides a vanilla, apple and caramel combo. Inspired by the dessert created by the Tatin sisters, a tart of caramelised apples cooked under a pastry lid.

name: Tartini
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Richly raspberry flavoured.

name: Tatanka Royale
instructions: SHAKE first two ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Champagne with a subtle, grassy hint of apple.

name: Tawny-Tini
ingredients: 2 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry yet rich. Port combines wonderfully with the maple syrup and is further fortified by the grainy vodka.

name: Teddy Bear
ingredients: ¾ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light (low in alcohol) and tad on the sweet side, apple and pear with a hint of cinnamon spice.

name: Tequila Sunset
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: STIR honey with tequila in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: A good sweet and sour balance with subtle honey hints.

name: Test Pilot
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A fruity, sophisticated Daiquiri with hints of almond and spicy clove, served short over ice.

name: Three Miler
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A seriously strong drink, in flavour and in alcohol.

name: Bee's Knees #1
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: STIR honey with rum until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Smooth and orangey to start, with a rum and honey finish.

name: Thriller From Vanilla
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange and creamy vanilla fortified with a hint of gin.

name: Tilt
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
Top up with Bitter lemon tonic
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with bitter lemon.
comment: Totally tropical taste.

name: Toasted Almond
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet but smooth, creamy and definitely toasted.

name: Toffee Apple
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The taste is just as the name suggests.

name: Tokyo Bloody Mary
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sake adds an interesting dimension to the traditionally vodka based Bloody Mary.

name: Beetle Jeuse
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint in base of shaker just enough to bruise. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Long and refreshing with a flavour reminiscent of caramelised apple.

name: Tre Martini
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A simple, well balanced, fruity drink, laced with rum.

name: Tribbble
ingredients: ½ shot Teichenné Butterscotch Schnapps Liqueur
½ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
½ shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
instructions: Refrigerate ingredients then LAYER in chilled glass by carefully pouring in the following order.
comment: Named Tribbble with three 'B's' due to its three layers: butterscotch, banana and Baileys.

name: Beja Flor Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sharp and quite dry but with a sweet banana twang.

name: Triple 'C' Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich vanilla, dark chocolate and cranberry juice. Indulgent and best after dinner.

name: Triple Orange
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This aperitif cocktail has a trio of orange flavours with the bitter orange of Campari adding character and balance.

name: Tripleberry
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
½ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich berry fruit fortified with vodka and tamed by the tannins from a splash of red wine.

name: Tropical Daiquiri
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A seriously tangy Daiquiri.

name: Tulip Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich but balanced with bags of fruit: apple, apricot and lemon.

name: Turkish Delight Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR honey and vodka in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rosewater, honey, chocolate and vanilla provide a distinct flavour of Turkish Delight - fortified with vodka.

name: Twisted Sobriety
ingredients: 1 shot Poire William eau de vie
instructions: STIR first two ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Fortified champagne with a hint of pear.

name: Two 'T' Fruity
ingredients: ¾ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Simple is beautiful - this drink is both. The rawness of vodka is balanced with sweet passion fruit and hints of orange bitters.

name: Uncle Vanya
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Simple but great - smooth, sweet 'n' sour blackberry, although possibly a tad on the sweet side for some.

name: Upside-Down Raspberry Cheesecake
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions:
First Layer: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add Chambord, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into centre of glass. 

Second Layer: Grate lemon zest into shaker. Add rest of ingredients, SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass over spoon so as to LAYER over raspberry base.
comment: Surprisingly, the biscuity top continues to float as you sip the vanilla cream layer right down to the point when you hit the raspberry base.

name: Valencia Cocktail No. 2
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: POUR first three ingredients into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Floral and fruity - makes Bucks Fizz look a tad sad.

name: Valkyrie Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: This sipping drink has a rich vanilla sweet 'n' sour flavour.

name: Vampiro
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Something of a supercharged Bloody Maria with a hint of sweet grenadine.

name: Vanilla & Raspberry Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Exactly that - vanilla and raspberries.

name: Bellini-Tini
ingredients: ½ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Peachy! Based on the Bellini, funnily enough.

name: Vanilla Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila (infused with vanilla)
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled chilled glass.
comment: A classic Margarita with a hint of vanilla.

name: Vanilla Sensation
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A pleasing vanilla twist on an Apple Martini.

name: Vanilla Vodka Sour
ingredients: ¾ shot Lightly spiced vanilla liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Vodka Sour with a blast of spicy vanilla.

name: Vavavoom
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: POUR ingredients into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: This drink does indeed give champagne that vavavoom.

name: Verdi Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A melange of fruits combine in a gluggable short drink.

name: Bentley
ingredients: 2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters (optional) Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into empty glass
comment: Dry, spiced wine impregnated with apple - pretty damn good.

name: Vodka Collins
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: A Tom Collins with vodka - a refreshing balance of sweet and sour.

name: Vodka Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A great vodka based drink balancing sweet and sour.

name: Voodoo
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
garnish: Dust with cinnamon powder (sprinkled through flame)
comment: The rich flavour of the aged rum marries well with apple and lime juice.

name: Walnut Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Toschi Nocello Walnut Liqueur de Noix
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Nutty but nice.

name: Waltzing Matilda
ingredients: ⅛ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: Cut passion fruit in half and scoop out flesh into shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale.
comment: Passion fruit, gin, wine and ginger ale all combine well in this refreshing drink.

name: Wanton Abandon
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A crowd-pleaser - looks great and its fruity, balanced flavour will offend few.

name: Watermelon & Basil Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut watermelon into 16 segments, chop the flesh from one segment into cubes and MUDDLE in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Refreshing watermelon with interesting herbal hints from the basil and gin.

name: Watermelon & Basil Smash
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: Cut watermelon into 16 segments, chop the flesh from one segment into cubes and MUDDLE in base of skater. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale.
comment: Sweet and sour, long and refreshing with subtle hints of basil, ginger and tequila amongst the fruit.

name: Watermelon Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Cut watermelon into 16 segments, chop the flesh from one segment into cubes and MUDDLE in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: So fruity, you could almost convince yourself this is a healthly drink.

name: The Wet Spot
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sharp but fresh tasting and moreish.

name: What The Hell
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin and dry apricots.

name: White Cosmo
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Just what it says on the tin.

name: White Lion (David Embury's recipe)
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This fruity Daiquiri is superb when made with quality pomegranate syrup and white rum to emerge with an off-white hue. Other renditions of this classic are ruby red - hardly a 'White' Lion.

name: White Russian Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE vodka and coffee liqueur with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. FLOAT lightly whipped cream on top of drink.
comment: A Black Russian smoothed with cream.

name: Wilton Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Refined cinnamon and apple.

name: Wimbledon Martini
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Strawberry in rim crowned with tip of mint sprig.
comment: Takes some getting through the fine strainer, but when you do it's simply strawberries and cream with the faintest hint of alcohol. Wimbledon is all about strawberries & cream.

name: The Windsor Rose
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An orange vodka and rosewater Cosmo.

name: Windy Miller
ingredients: ½ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
1 shot Mandarine Napoleon Grande Liqueur Imperiale
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with lemonade.
comment: British readers over 40 may remember the children's TV series Trumpton, Chigley and Camberwick Green. If you do, then sing between sips, 'Pugh, Pugh, Barney McGrew, Cuthbert, Dibble and Grubb.'

name: Winter Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Reminiscent of an Apple Cart (a Calvados Sidecar), this is simple, balanced and tastes great.

name: Woo Woo
ingredients: ¾ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Fruity, dry cranberry laced with vodka and sweet peach liqueur. A quaffable cocktail from the 1980s.

name: Yellow Parrot
ingredients: ¼ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
1 shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The aniseed of the absinthe combines well with the other ingredients. A bit of a sweety but a strong old bird.

name: Zakuski Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE cucumber in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Named after the Russian snack.

name: The Zamboanga 'Zeinie' Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Maraschino syrup (from cherry jar)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Reminiscent of a tropical Sidecar.

name: Zaza
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Zaza is a diminutive of Isabelle. But there is nothing diminutive about this simple, yet fantastic drink.

name: Zelda Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bison grass vodka combines brilliantly with mint and almond.

name: Zombie #1 (Intoxica! Recipe)
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: STIR brown sugar with lemon juice in base of shaker until it dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Plenty of flavour and alcohol with tangy rum and fruit.

name: The Big Easy
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale.
comment: Fruity and refreshing with a hint of spice.

name: Zombie Cocktail (modern recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE first nine ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. FLOAT overproof rum.
comment: A heady mix of four different rums with pineapple, orange, lime and grenadine.

name: Bikini Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
¾ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A vivid blue combination of lemon, orange and peach laced with gin.

name: Alice Mine
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Medium Dry Martini with luscious orange notes.

name: Apricot Rickey
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: Light, fruity and refreshing, if a little on the sweet side.

name: Arnold Palmer (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: 3 shot Freshly brewed cold black English breakfast tea
1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Real lemon iced tea. Balanced and wonderfully refreshing.

name: Brandy Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Subtle mint and citrus lightly flavour the cognac.

name: Citrus Rum Cooler
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with lemonade. Lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Light, fruity, easy and very refreshing.

name: El Presidente #4
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry, but not bone dry, with balanced fruit from the triple sec and vermouth.

name: Fifty-Fifty Dry Martini
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A very 'wet' but wonderfully Dry Martini which demands an olive, not a twist. Before you start - Craddock calls for it to be shaken, but its better stirred. Shaking tends to suit Martinis with a low vermouth ratio.

name: Bishop
ingredients: 2½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: Use a heatproof glass and preheat by filling with boiling water. MUDDLE cloves in the base of shaker. Add boiling water and STIR in honey and other ingredients. Fine strain into glass. (Consider heating in MICROWAVE for twenty seconds to boost temperature).
comment: A flavoursome and warming variation on mulled wine.

name: Huapala
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: In his book Vic prefaces this cocktail with the comment, "Nice, easy drink". It's basically a lemon Daiquiri with gin and grenadine.

name: Iced Tea Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tannic and bittersweet. A refreshing after dinner drink.

name: London Cosmopolitan
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Basically a Cosmopolitan but made with London dry gin instead of citrus vodka.

name: Oceanbreeze
ingredients: 1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: POUR cranberry juice into ice-filled glass. SHAKE other ingredients with ice and carefully strain into glass to LAYER over the cranberry juice. Serve with straws.
comment: Refreshingly juicy.

name: Presidente Menocal Special
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅛ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: What hot Cuban summers are made for.

name: Silver Bronx
ingredients: ¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Bronx made 'silver' by the addition of egg white.

name: Southside
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin and mint with a splash of lime. Refreshingly balanced.

name: Strawberry Blonde
ingredients: ¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and serve with straws.
comment: This long, refreshing orange-red drink is basically a vodka-laced strawberry flavoured real lemonade.

name: The Surfer
instructions: POUR lemonade into ice-filled glass to two-thirds full. FLOAT cognac over lemonade. Serve with straws and instruct drinker to stir ingredients before drinking.
comment: Simple but tasty and very refreshing. The use of good ice and a quality lemonade is essential to this drink's success.

name: Tahitian Honey Bee
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR honey with rum in base of shaker so as to dissolve honey. Add lemon juice, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Basically a honey Daiquiri - very tasty it is too.

name: Tom Arnold
ingredients: ¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 shot Freshly brewed cold black English breakfast tea
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Traditional lemonade laced with vodka and lengthened with tea to make a light and refreshing drink.

name: Toreador
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glas.
comment: Apricot brandy replaces triple sec in what otherwise follows the same recipe to a classic Margarita.

name: Black & White Daiquiri
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE berries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A blackberry and coconut flavoured Daiquiri.

name: Alberto Martini
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry, complex and aromatic. An equal parts gin and vermouth Martini with a good dose of fino sherry and a splash of triple sec.

name: Amalia
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sip a gooseberry and mint influenced lemon Daiquiri though a foam topping.

name: Anejo Highball
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¾ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Orange and rum with a hint of ginger spice. Long and thirst-quenching.

name: Apple, Cucumber & Elderflower cup
instructions: MUDDLE cucumber in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apple and Zubrówka is a magic combination, as is apple and elderflower. Here these flavoursome combinations are enhanced and freshened by cucumber.

name: Argentina Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A wet martini softened by liqueur and given a hint of citrus and spice.

name: Argha Noah
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Delicately spiced, honeyed and sherried aged rum.

name: Army Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This rosé Martini is harder than it looks - perhaps why the name?

name: Astor
ingredients: 1 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Citrus and the tang of Swedish punch add a distinctive flavour to gin in this tasty vintage cocktail.

name: Astoria
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An Old Tom based super wet (two-thirds vermouth to one-third gin) Martini with a slug of orange bitters and served with a twist.

name: B & T
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicately spiced and slightly sweetened tequila.

name: Bamboo (Savoy's 1930 recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The combination of vermouth and fino makes for a fabulously complex cocktail.

name: Banana Flambé
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: In a shallow dish flambé half a split banana with orange juice, sugar and cinnamon. FLAMBÉ until the banana softens completely and the orange juice reduces. Add cognac and flambé further. MUDDLE banana in the base of shaker, add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: As Tony says "it's worth it".

name: Bandera
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: POUR tequila and lime juice into separate shot (caballitos) glasses. To make Sangrita to fill third glass, SHAKE rest of ingredients with ice and fine strain into glass. Instruct drinker to sip from all three glasses alternatively.
comment: In Mexico the quality of the homemade Sangrita can make or break a bar. The Sangrita in this trio is spicy and slightly sweet.

name: Barney Barnato Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange always works when mixed with cognac and here Dubonnet also tames and adds an aromatic wine complexity.

name: Batida de Abacaxi
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: This easy crowd pleaser is creamy, fruity and to taste - only vaguely alcoholic.

name: Black Forest Gateau
ingredients: ¾ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. FLOAT cream on drink. (It pays to whip cream first.)
comment: Dessert by name and dessert by nature. Wonderfully moreish, naughty but very nice.

name: Beachcomber's Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with one 6oz scoop crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: Basically a frozen rum margarita.

name: Bearskin Martini
ingredients: ⅛ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A caraway influenced Martini.

name: The Beauty Beneath
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled glass.
comment: Orange dominates this bitter-sweet Manhattan, come Daiquiri, come Negroni.

name: Berry Smash (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Red berries with a splash of apple juice and honey served over crushed ice.

name: Beverly Hills Hotel Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry, but not oppressively so. Zingy grapefruit with gin complexity and delicate floral notes.

name: Bicardar
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
⅛ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Subtle and delicate with hints of apricot, cherry, lemon and orange.

name: Bitches Brew
ingredients: 1 shot Clément Canne Bleue 2016 Martinique Rhum blanc Agricole
1 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot St. Elizabeth Allspice Dram
½ shot Demerara sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients without ice. Add ice, SHAKE again and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This flavoursome flip-style drink comes served with a hint of Caribbean spice.

name: Bitter Lady
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: We have dramatically cut the Campari and lemon in Mickael's original recipe to make a much lighter drink.

name: Black Strap
ingredients: ½ shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This drink benefits from the dilution, which comes with a lengthy stir.

name: Black Magic
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add liqueur, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: More peachy in colour than black but balanced and tasty. Not sweet.

name: Blue Mountain Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A balanced wake-up call where the blue mountain means coffee and freshly squeezed orange juice.

name: Bohemian Mule
ingredients: 1 shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer and lightly stir.
comment: Long and refreshing whilst also packing a full shot of absinthe - perhaps the best spirit to hold its own when drowned with fiery ginger beer, a combo used to good effect in this mule with lime juice.

name: Bronze Adonis
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled glass.
comment: A simple yet fabulous twist on the Adonis.

name: Butterfly Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light and refreshing but with citrus complexity.

name: Byculla
ingredients: 1 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Claret-cum-mulled wine, but hold out for the warming ginger finish.

name: Campirinha
ingredients: ¼ fresh Fresh ruby red grapefruit (chopped wedges)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lime and grapefruit in base of shaker to release juices. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with 6oz scoop crushed ice and pour all without straining into glass.
comment: This bright red fruit laden drink has the looks to appeal to all but its bitter-sweet flavour is specific to Campari convertees.

name: Champagne Pick-Me-Up
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A subtle hint of biscuity champagne shines through this very quaffable drink.

name: Champino
instructions: SHAKE first 2 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A champagne option for Negroni lovers.

name: Cherry Mariner
ingredients: 1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich cherry liqueurs fortified by gin and bittered with a hint of orange.

name: Chrysanthemum
ingredients: ⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Herbal and aromatic, this benefits from the dilution that comes with a good long stir.

name: Black 'N' Blue Caipirovska
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE berries in base of glass. Add other ingredients. Fill glass with crushed ice and CHURN (stir) with bar spoon. Serve with straws.
comment: A great fruity twist on the regular Caipirovska.

name: Churchill Martini
instructions: STIR gin with ice while glancing at an unopened bottle of dry vermouth. Strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin served chilled and neat, other than with a little dilution courtesy of melting ice. A great man but not necessarily a great drink.

name: Cider House Rules
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice & fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Margarita-style drink with tequila, lemon and apple juice.

name: Clairvoyant
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice & fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A hazelnut flavoured variation on the classic Coronation Cocktail.

name: Cloysters
ingredients: ½ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice & fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: There's a suitable subtle monastic influence to this complex, gin based, most learned of cocktails.

name: Clubland Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Taylor's Chip Dry White Port
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice & fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Go easy on the bitters and this is a complex and rewarding Martini-style drink.

name: El Coco
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅛ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rum and coconut water with the merest hint of lime.

name: Colony
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Grapefruit and maraschino balance each other in this gin-based classic.

name: Cuban Heal
ingredients: 2½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Cynar Ricetta Originale Artichoke Amaro Liqueur
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Honey-ed and initially sweet with herbal spirity rum notes adding depth.

name: Daiquiri No.4 (Florida style)
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with finely crushed ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Maraschino cherry liqueur flavours this finely balanced golden rum based Daiquiri.

name: Death In The Gulf Stream
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) and add more ice until glass is filled.
comment: Remembering that Hemingway was a diabetic so had a very sour tooth, we believe this drink needs more than 'one teaspoon' of sugar. Thus we've added half a shot of sugar syrup to the original recipe. It also benefits from dilution, so be sure to shake well and churn in the glass.

name: Dimi-tini
ingredients: ¼ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Like Dimi - this drink's easy to like.

name: Doheny Pisco Punch
ingredients: 2 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of shaker. Add next five ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer.
comment: Vincenzo's twist on the San Franciscan classic.

name: Dreiklang (Three of a Kind)
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR sugar syrup with two ice cubes, add xoxolate mole and stir again. Add more ice plus tequila and STIR some more.
comment: Named after the German word for 'three of a kind' due to the trio of flavours encountered in this drink; orange, agave and chocolate.

name: The Dubonnet Cocktail #1
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Simple yet complex. Dry and aromatic.

name: Dutch Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Rutte Old Simon Genever
⅛ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
⅛ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A modern twist on the classic Dr Martini inspired by a vintage bartender. In his 1882 New and Improved Bartender's Manual Harry Johnson's Martini Cocktail recipe calls for "a dash of curaçao or absinthe, if required."

name: Dutch Master
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: It's a vodka and tonic but not like you know it.

name: East Village Athletic Club
ingredients: ¾ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Essentially a Last Word with tequila instead of gin.

name: Eastern Raspberry Sidecar
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE raspberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Refreshing, fruity, easy drinking.

ingredients: 2½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) to emulsify and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: Fantastically complex with notes of rum, maraschino, sherry and orange.

name: Elixirita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Basically a Tommy's Margarita with a splash of cognac served straight-up.

name: Fizz á la Violette
ingredients: ¼ shot Créme de violette liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions:
1/ Flash BLEND first 6 ingredients without ice (to emulsify mix). Then pour contents of blender into shaker and SHAKE with ice. Strain into chilled glass (no ice in glass) and TOP with soda from siphon.

Alternatively: 2/ SHAKE first 6 ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and strain into chilled glass (no ice). TOP with soda water from siphon.
comment: A delicate floral drink that is so creamy smooth that it is almost fluffy.

name: Full Monte
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first eight ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Champagne replaces cola and maraschino liqueur replaces triple sec in this sophisticated adaptation of a Long Island Iced Tea.

name: Gin Daisy #2 (Jerry Thomas style)
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with a splash of soda from a siphon.
comment: The rich style of genever combines wonderfully with orange liqueur in this balanced classic.

name: Gin Daisy #3 (Modern long style)
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and serve with straws.
comment: Fruit and botanicals served long and refreshing.

name: Gin Punch #2
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
⅛ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
⅛ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. Serve with straws.
