comment: Easy on the palate yet incredibly complex. Linseed oil notes of jenever shine through.

name: Ginger Snap
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into an ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and serve with straws.
comment: This balanced Gin Collins is sweetened by ginger and orange liqueurs.

name: Good Hope Plantation Rum Punch
ingredients: 1 shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with soda.
comment: A classic citrus laced, big flavoured, punch.

name: Grand Designs
ingredients: ¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: MUDDLE rosemary in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Easy drinking and slightly sweet, dried and made altogether grander by the rosemary.

name: Grand Slam
ingredients: 2 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This after dinner libation is slightly sweet but incredibly aromatic.

name: Grape Cocktail #2
ingredients: ¼ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass
comment: Green Chartreuse adds extra complexity to what would otherwise be simply be vodka laced grape juice.

name: Guard's Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
⅛ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Old Guard but this Sweet Martini made sweeter with a dash of orange liqueur well deserves a place on modern cocktail lists.

name: Habanero
ingredients: 1 slice Jalapeño or Fresno chilli pepper (fine sliced)
2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE ginger and chilli in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine-strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Daiquiri-style drink with honey, ginger and chilli.

name: Hibiscus Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Hibiscus combines wonderfully with tequila in this flavoursome Margarita.

name: Hoffman House
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A shaken Wet (5:1) Martini with orange bitters.

name: Hula Hula or Hoola-Hoola Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Pineapple wedge on rim with Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: Gin and juice - orange with a splash of orange liqueur.

name: Ideal
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
⅛ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Aromatic and herbal with grapefruit sourness balancing sweeter notes.

name: Indochine
ingredients: ¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet and very frothy. Easy drinking with a ginger kick.

name: Judgement Day
ingredients: 1 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Charles was pretty sour about his experience when he created this very aromatic sour.

name: Juniport Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into empty chilled glass. TOP with soda from a siphon.
comment: This straightforward fizz benefits from the unusual combination of gin and port.

name: Kanu-No
ingredients: 2¼ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The rum's sherry notes are heightened by the addition of port and sherry.

name: The Lady Wears Red
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
¼ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
⅛ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅛ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine-strain chilled glass. FLOAT champagne foam made by macerating orange zests in champagne overnight, adding gelatin and charging with N2O siphon.
comment: This 'Lady' is high maintenance but she delivers a complex reward.

name: Lemon Caipirovska
ingredients: ¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lemon in base of shaker, add other ingredients and SHAKE with 6oz scoop crushed ice. Pour into glass without straining and serve with straws.
comment: A lemon-tastic Caipirovska.

name: The Leavenworth
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This great cocktail is dramatically influenced by the style of rum used. Francesco's original recipe calls for English Harbour rum.

name: The Libertine
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer and lightly stir.
comment: Huge flavours delicately combine in this surprisingly approachable drink.

name: London Scramble
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice. DRIZZLE créme de mûre over drink (will slowly bleed through the cocktail).
comment: A tequila Bramble of which I'm sure Dick Bradsell (the legendary bartender behind the original Bramble) would be most approving.

name: The Long Shot
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain ice-filled glass. TOP with soda, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: A simple variation on William Schmidt's Alabazam.

name: Lonsdale
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR honey syrup with gin until honey dissolves. TEAR basil leaves and add to shaker with all other ingredients. SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Not dry, not sweet, just balanced, long and refreshing.

name: Maçã Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Subtle combination of cachaça, fresh lime, apple juice and elderflower.

name: Maestro
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Strawberry and balsamic are a great combo - here served with orange juice, vodka and maple syrup.

name: Bloody Maria
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: ROLL rather than shake all ingredients in a shaker with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
garnish: Salt & pepper rim plus celery stick
comment: Tequila adds interesting flavours to the classic Bloody Mary.

name: Maison Charles Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Reminiscent of concentrated Mojito.

name: Mañana Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Salmon pink in colour, the Mañana has a subtle and delicate rum laced apricot flavour.

name: Margaret Duffy
ingredients: 2 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spiced and sweetened cognac.

name: Market Daiquirí
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classic Daiquiri influenced by the addition of pear, mint and almonds.

name: Martinez (with London Dry gin)
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅛ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: STIR ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This Martinez is aromatic, complex and very dry.

name: Martinez (Orange)
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
instructions: STIR ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Stir well as dilution helps to tame this old-school classic in which bitter orange predominates.

name: Matador #2 (Tommy's Style)
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A pineapple Margarita with agave syrup in place of a sweet liqueur.

name: Mayfair Cocktail #2
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¼ shot St. Elizabeth Allspice Dram
instructions: MUDDLE cloves in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin with spicy cloves and hints of apricot and orange.

name: The Mayflower Martini
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fragrant balance of English fruits and flowers.

name: Agent Orange
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Fresh orange is good for you. This has all of the flavour but few of the health benefits.

name: Le Minuit
ingredients: ½ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Absinthe based but incredibly subtle. Absinthe combines wonderfully with wine and apple.

name: Moondream
ingredients: ¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Crème de pêche (peach) liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Also try with subtle styles of dry vermouth such as Dolin.

name: Mosquito
ingredients: 2 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A short pisco based Mojito.

name: Mulata Daisy
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE fennel seeds in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicately spiced and subtly chocolatey.

name: Naranja
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR one shot of rum with two ice cubes in a glass. Add sugar syrup, vermouth, bitters and two more ice cubes. STIR some more and add another two ice cubes and the rest of the rum. STIR lots more and add more ice.
comment: Rum based twist on the classic Old-Fashioned.

name: Northern Sun
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Subtle and easy. Hard to believe this drink contains two measures of rum.

name: Noshino Martini
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: If good quality sake and shochu are used then this can be a great drink. However, it lacks the alcoholic bite I associate with a true Martini, so I much prefer this drink when vodka is used in place of shochu.

name: Nuez Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Toschi Nocello Walnut Liqueur de Noix
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Daiquiri with nutty notes.

name: Oceans 21
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apple, cranberry and orange.

name: Orange Spur
ingredients: ½ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Stir well - this bittersweet drink benefits from dilution.

name: Pablo Alvarez de Cañas Special
ingredients: ⅛ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Place lemon zest in shaker, add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
garnish: Pineapple cubes, Luxardo Maraschino cherry & orange slice
comment: Sherry is most prevalent on the palate, but all the other ingredients, including the lemon zest, also contribute to this subtle, balanced and altogether a most unusual cocktail.

name: Pineapple Fix
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Rum and pineapple are a match made in heaven, here with lemon adding citrus freshness.

name: RAC Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: A one to one Perfect Martini with extra grenadine sweetness and orange bitters adding complexity.

name: Richmond Gimlet
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A properly grown-up Gimlet.

name: Saratoga Cocktail #2
ingredients: ¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry and robust with cognac character combining well with maraschino and raspberry.

name: Satin Sheet
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A spiced margarita-style drink.

name: Spitfire
ingredients: ½ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A brandy sour with a splash of dry white wine.

name: Swedish Rum Punch
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¾ shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A flavoursome Daiquiri-style with the subtle spice of Swedish punch.

name: Thai Red Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ sprig Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE pepper in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Created in December 2008 by yours truly (Simon D) at the Cabinet Room, London, England.

name: Waldorf Cocktail No.2
ingredients: 2 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Lime works better than lemon but like the Astor, using a combination of lime and lemon makes for a better drink.

name: Walnut Alexander
ingredients: ½ shot Toschi Nocello Walnut Liqueur de Noix
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: One to accompany the nutty chocolates from the after-dinner selection box.

name: Warsaw Pact
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fruit and mint flavours combine in this beautifully balanced complex yet easy cocktail.

name: Wild Blossom
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Aptly named - it is indeed blossom-like, yet also dry and serious.

name: You've Got Mail
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE first 5 ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Cachaça and citrus balanced by honey and topped with champagne.

name: Zac's Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Originally made for Zacapa rum which suits lemon rather than lime in a Daiquiri. Daiquiris benefit from dilution and here a dash of apple juice adds a barely perceptible amount of fruit as well.

name: Death By Chocolate
ingredients: 1½ shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
1 shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with two 12oz scoops of crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: Unsophisticated but delicious. Don't be cheap - use deluxe ice cream.

name: Dream Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An after-dinner drink with brandy, orange liqueur and a refreshing burst of aniseed. Double the measure of anisette liqueur if a tad on the sweet side.

name: East India House
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry and challenging - rewarding for some.

name: Elderflower Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Elderflower liqueur adds floral interest to the classic Daiquiri.

name: Elysian
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
3 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry and aromatic, although not for all tastes.

name: Encantado
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Essentially a Margarita with a hint of peach and raspberry. Not too sweet.

name: Fat Tire
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: This flavourful, bittersweet aperitif won't be to everyone's taste.

name: Feather Duster Crusta
ingredients: ½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Find a lemon which fits into a small wineglass tightly enough to act as a watertight extension to the glass. Cut off both ends of the fruit and carefully remove the pulp to leave a barrel-shaped shell of skin. Place in the top of the glass. Wet the edge of the glass and exposed fruit shell with sugar syrup and dip in caster sugar to frost the edge of both peel and glass. Leave for a couple of hours to form a hard crust.
comment: In Gregor's own words, "based on the father of the Sidecar, the granddad of the Margarita, Laydeez an' Gennulmen! The Brandy Crusta."

name: French 77
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: POUR first two ingredients into chilled glass, and TOP with champagne.
comment: Elderflower liqueur adds flavour to champagne while a splash of lemon juice balances the sweetness.

name: Froupe Cocktail
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A bittersweet, herbal old-school drink that's in line for rediscovery.

name: Fuego Manzana No.2
ingredients: 2 slice Jalapeño or Fresno chilli pepper
2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lighly MUDDLE (just press) chili pepper in base of shaker to release its flavour. (If you muddle hard then the finished cocktail will be overly spicy). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Small red chilli (warn drinker not to eat)
comment: A hint of chilli heat adds interest to an Apple Margarita, creating a full flavoured contemporary classic.

name: G & Tea
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly brewed cold black English breakfast tea
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: Dry, floral, long and refreshing.

name: Geisha Mar-Tea-Knee
ingredients: ¾ shot Zen green tea liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Surprisingly fresh and light, this starts slightly sweet but finishes with refreshing bitter tannins. Tea pearls - hand-rolled balls of tea leaves -make a wonderful garnish.

name: Blue Moon Cocktail (1940's recipe)
ingredients: ½ shot Créme de violette liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment:
A relation of the Aviation Cocktail, this drink features on the back label of Créme Yvette bottles dating from the 1940s. Now once again available, consequently this liqueur is more identified with the Blue Moon than crème de violette, which appears in some other versions of the Blue Moon.

When made with crème de violette (use ¾ shot) the drink is indeed a blue-grey colour, as befits its name. However, when made with Crème Yvette (you’ll only need a ½ shot) the drink is more pink than blue, so leading me to think that it was originally made with crème de violette.

name: Green Glazier
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¼ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This Martini-style drink doesn't take any prisoners. Go easy.

name: Green Tea Cocktail #2
ingredients: ¾ shot Zen green tea liqueur
¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass
comment: Exactly what it says on the tin: as subtle and delicate as green tea itself.

name: Gypsy #1
ingredients: ¼ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dominic describes this drink as "a little homage to the 'Last Word' cocktail".

name: Haydenistic
ingredients: ⅛ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Extremely subtle, like a very complex Wet Vodkatini.

name: Hearst Martini
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fantastically wet, sweet and aromatic Martini.

name: Hemingway Martini
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Maraschino syrup (from cherry jar)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A fresh and refreshing orange and vanilla influenced Vodkatini.

name: The Holland House #3 (Genever based)
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Genever adds its own complexity to this Dutch version of the classic Holland House.

name: Hop Toad #3
ingredients: 1½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh apricot dessert - all it lacks is a dollop of whipped cream.

name: The Horseshoe Sling
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Like its creator, this is upfront and refreshingly different.

name: Hypnotic Margarita
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Liqueurs combine harmoniously with lime and tequila in this tangy, fruity Margarita. However, I remain unconvinced by Hpnotiq.

name: Jasmine & Elderflower Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicate and floral yet dry and serious. The tannins in the tea complement and balance the drink.

name: Air Mail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: This old classic is basically a Honeysuckle served long and topped with champagne, rum, honey and a touch of citrus freshness make this one of the better champagne cocktails.

name: John Daly
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 shot Freshly brewed cold black English breakfast tea
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Essentially an alcoholic iced tea, this is bittersweet and refreshing - perfect for a hot afternoon.

name: Knicker Dropper Glory
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Nutty sweetness sharpened with lemon.

name: L'amour En Fuite
ingredients: ½ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions:
1. POUR absinthe into ice-filled glass, TOP with water and leave to stand.
2. Separately STIR gin, vermouth and elderflower liqueur with ice.
3. DISCARD contents of glass (absinthe, water and ice) and STRAIN contents of mixing glass into absinthe-coated glass. (No ice in glass.)
comment: Serious yet approachably subtle with hints of vermouth and elderflower dominated by absinthe and gin.

name: Last Straw
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Three stages of the apple's alcoholic journey, juice, cider and brandy, are sweetened and aromatised by elderflower liqueur.

name: Lucien Gaudin
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A must try for anyone who loves Negronis.

name: The Mackinnon
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Honeyed rum with herbal and citrus nuances.

name: Marie Rose
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Strip leaves from rosemary and MUDDLE with grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rosemary spiced gin with grape juice and elderflower: very aromatic.

name: Mood Indigo
ingredients: ½ shot Créme de violette liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Smooth, delicate and floral: the gin and brandy add just enough bite.

name: Moonlight Cocktail (Harry Craddock's recipe)
ingredients: ¼ shot G. Miclo Kirsch Vieux Grande Reserve Eau de Vie
1¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Craddock describes this as 'a very dry cocktail'. It is, but pleasantly so.

name: Neal's Barbados Cosmopolitan
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Your standard Cosmo made more complex by a slug of warm Caribbean spirit.

name: Nuclear Daiquiri
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¼ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A great way to inflict mutually assured destruction, although there will be fallout the morning after.

name: Blue Velvet Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: May look lurid but is a surprisingly tasty Margarita.

name: Obituary
ingredients: ⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: What a way to go. A Dry Martini with a dash of the green fairy.

name: Old Flame
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bittersweet, orchard fresh orange charged with gin.

name: Pina Colada Cocktail (Cuban Style)
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: This Colada has no coconut, but it is smooth, balanced and rather tasty.

name: Blueberry Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Lejay Creme de Myrtille (Blueberry) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE blueberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Blueberry juice and liqueur lengthens and sweetens an otherwise classic Daiquiri.

name: Rizzo
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The tangy, sharp grapefruit reveals hints of apple spirit smoothed by grenadine.

name: Salflower Sour
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Classic sweet and sour enhanced by floral notes.

name: Serendipity #2
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Spirity, minty apple invigorated by a splash of champagne.

name: Sidecarriage
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Hints of cider come through in this calvados based Sidecar with an elderflower twist.

name: Strawberry & Balsamic Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Balsamic vinegar of Modena
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The balsamic adds a little extra interest to the fortified strawberries.

name: Valentino
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled glass.
comment: A variation on the Negroni. More gin and less Campari, make for an unusual bittersweet Martini.

name: Blueberry Cocktail #2
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¾ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
instructions: MUDDLE blueberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich blueberry fruit fortified with vodka made more interesting by a splash of wine.

name: Wah-Wah
ingredients: 1½ shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
¾ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bittersweet and complex with hints of elderflower and grapefruit.

name: Wash House
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE basil (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicately herbal - simple but refreshing.

name: Waters of Chaos
ingredients: ¼ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Robust flavours of overproof rum and Chartreuse combine with Dutch jenever in this Last Word-like cocktail.

name: Blueberry Tea
ingredients: ¾ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
Top up with Hot English breakfast tea
instructions: POUR first two ingredients into glass, top up with tea and stir.
comment: This does indeed taste just as described on the tin.

name: Apple Fool
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed ruby grapefruit juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This drink looks like it is going to be good for you, it's fresh and enlivening.

name: Apple Martini # 2
ingredients: 1 shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: There are as many different recipes for this drink as there are varieties of apple and brands of apple liqueur: this one was popular in the UK during the Noughties.

name: BBC Cocktail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Becherovka Original (Carlsbad Becher) Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Based on the classic B & B cocktail with rum replacing brandy and Becherovka in place of Bènèdictine.

name: Berlin Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The sweet powerful flavours of kummel and maraschino liqueurs are tamed and harnessed in this sour.

name: The Bird is the Word No.1
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: To quote Fraser Campbell, the drinks creator, "influenced primarily by "The Last Word" with hints of "Yellow Parrot" ...and a tequila base."

name: Black Tie
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Depending on the sweetness of your molasses, you may not need to add sugar syrup.

name: Breakfast Gimlet
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR marmalade with gin in base of shaker to dissolve marmalade. Add lemon juice and lime cordial, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange marmalade both justifies the 'breakfast' prefix and adds complexity to this gimlet.

name: Blushin' Russian
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A White Russian with a hint of almond.

name: Culross Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light rum, aromatic wine served 'up' with the marzipan and almond notes of apricot liqueur. Originally made with Lillet Blanc in place of dry vermouth.

name: Fernando
ingredients: ⅛ shot Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: An unusually vermouth based herbal cocktail - very fresh and aromatic.

name: A.J.
ingredients: 2 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Amazingly simple and beautifully balanced. I hope you like apple brandy as much as I do.

name: G. G and G
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into an ice-filled rocks glass.
comment: Pine fresh gin notes combine with aniseed and herbal notes, freshened by pink grapefruit and toned by dashes of orange bitters.

name: Gypsy Queen #1
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Vodka both fortifies and brings out subtle bready cereal notes in this complexly spiced cocktail.

name: Hot Tommy
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: Place spoon in glass. POUR first 3 ingredients into glass. TOP up with boiling water and STIR until agave nectar dissolves.
comment: A Mexican twist on the original winter pick-me-up.

name: Mr Kappes
ingredients: 2 shot G. Miclo Kirsch Vieux Grande Reserve Eau de Vie
1 shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A quality Germanic brand of Kirschwasser is key to this complex drink.

name: Mr President
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A combination of the El-Presidente and Negroni. A drink Campari lovers will appreciate.

name: Orange Negroni
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and stir.
comment: Orange and Campari always combine well especially when supported by sweet vermouth.

name: Oranjey Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry, and yes, very orangey with bittersweet orange complexity.

name: Petruchio Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin-based and bitter-sweet, this bright orange drink has a foamy head which may mislead some into thinking it is sweet and easy.

name: Rhode Island Red
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer, lightly stir and serve with straws.
comment: Tequila with a hint of berry fruit, slightly sweetened with agave nectar, spiced and made long with ginger beer.

name: Bolero Sour
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into an ice-filled glass.
comment: A beautifully balanced, flavoursome medley of sweet and sour.

name: Ruby Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
⅛ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A well-balanced, almond influenced Daiquiri.

name: Rude Gypsy
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet but wonderfully herbal and slightly spicy.

name: Bolshoi Punch
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: An innocuous-seeming pink classic - richly flavoured and easy to drink.

name: Stratosphere
ingredients: ¼ shot Créme de violette liqueur
instructions: POUR liqueur into glass and TOP with champagne.
comment: The thinking woman's Kir Royal.

name: Sweetie Pie
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¼ shot St. Elizabeth Allspice Dram
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bitter sweet and most intriguing.

name: Tanglefoot
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light rum, lemon and orange juice served short with a tang of Swedish punch.

name: Too Ache Sidecar
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tuaca replaces Cointreau in this twist on the Sidecar.

name: Unicar
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A mismade but fabulously balanced Sidecar inspired this drink.

name: Waterloo Sunset
instructions: STIR first two ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne. Add raspberry liqueur.
comment: Fruity, pink champagne. Girls are going to love it.

name: Bomber
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer, stir and serve with straws.
comment: Cross between a Moscow Mule and a Cuba Libre.

name: Absinthe Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classic Gin Martini made aniseed fresh with a dash of absinthe.

name: Applejack Rabbit
ingredients: 1½ shot Laird's Straight Bottled in Bond applejack
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled jar.
garnish: Cinnamon stick and dust with freshly grated cinnamon
comment: Apple brandy sweetened by maple syrup, soured by lemon and lengthened with orange.

name: Le Dijonnais Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A most unusual cocktail based on a most unusual product - mustard liqueur.

name: Fiendtini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A gin Martini 'dirtied' with pickled gherkin brine and garnished with a pickled gherkin.

name: Improved Holland Gin Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¼ spoon La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ spoon Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Salmon-pink with subtle juniper, rounded by maraschino liqueur, Angostura bitters and absinthe.

name: Bon Bon
ingredients: ⅓ shot Teichenné Butterscotch Schnapps Liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Lemon zest twist (discarded) & Bon Bon sweets
comment: Relive your youth and the taste of those big round sweets with this sweet-n-sour lemony cocktail.

name: Melba Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ spoon La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A dry Daiquiri-like drink with pomegranate, a touch of absinthe and pine fresh notes.

name: Skid Row
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Complex and strong in alcohol, bitter-sweet with apricot liqueur and amaro and Dutch jenever.

name: London Gypsy
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: The botanicals in the gin and the herbal Benedictine combine well in this drink which is balanced by the addition of bitters.

name: Blue Moon Cocktail (Dale DeGroff's recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE blueberry in base of shaker (just to break skin). ADD vodka and one heaped spoon of oolong tea and stir in base of shaker for 60 seconds (or better still, leave to steep for ten minutes). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A hint of blueberry fruit with oolong tea, elderflower, sage and lemon.

name: Charlie Chaplin Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Rutte Sloe Gin liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dilution is key to this fruity bitter-sweet cocktail, hence the possible need to add some water depending on your ice.

name: Chocolate Stinger
ingredients: ¾ shot Giffard Menthe Pastille white crème de menthe liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Chocolate and mint served frappé.

name: Bosom Caresser
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Verdelho madeira (medium dry) 10 year old
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: No bosoms to hand, then caress your throat.

name: Corpse Reviver No.Blue
ingredients: ¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
¾ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: "Considering it's blue, I quite like it," was the general opinion from across the Cabinet Room bar.

name: Creole Gimlet
ingredients: ½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
1 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Falernum adds a touch of Caribbean spice to this Gimlet.

name: Death in Venice
ingredients: Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: POUR Campari and grapefruit bitters into chilled glass and TOP with Prosecco.
comment: Something of a cross between the Italian Spritz and Ernest Hemingway's Death in the Afternoon.

name: Devil's Horn
ingredients: 1 slice Jalapeño or Fresno chilli pepper (fine sliced)
2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: Lighly MUDDLE (just press) chili pepper in base of shaker to release its flavour. (If you muddle hard then the finished cocktail will be overly spicy). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Two chillies on rim to form devil's horns
comment: A great balance of sweetness, sourness and spice.

name: Dutch Word
ingredients: ⅔ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
⅔ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Lime zest twist (discarded) & lime wedge on rim
comment: A genever-based variation to the classic Last Word cocktail.

name: Entwistle's Error
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE first two ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: Richly flavoured - an elongated long aged daiquiri-like cocktail.

name: Fandango
ingredients: ½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A heady mix of gin, vodka and the distinctive herbal flavour of Chartreuse.

name: Bossa Nova #1
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Apple with the added zing of rum, Galliano, apricot and lime juice.

name: Fur Collar
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apricot brandy adds fruity zingyness to what otherwise would be a Screwdriver served 'up'.

name: Woodside
ingredients: ½ ring Pineapple (fresh) (cored, skinned and chopped)
¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth (grapefruit infused)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE pineapple in base of shaker and add other ingredients. DRY SHAKE (without ice), then SHAKE again with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicately fruity, light and fluffy.

name: Voodoo I Do
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE pineapple in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Pineapple, tequila, orange and apricot with a touch of sour lime all presented in an harmonious Tiki-style concoction.

name: Very Rusty Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Honey and spice notes from Drambuie add interest to this Aged Daiquiri.

name: Up In The Air
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apple, almond and lemon juice fortified with vodka in this richly flavoured sweet and sour cocktail.

name: Tropic Thunder
ingredients: ¾ shot Crème de pêche (peach) liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Dust with freshly ground black pepper
comment: Gin, peach, lemon juice and pineapple juice may not seem the most obvious combination but it's a combo that works.

name: Treacle No.2
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¼ shot Demerara sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR one shot of rum with two ice cubes in a glass. Add sugar syrup, bitters and two more ice cubes. STIR some more and add another two ice cubes and the rest of the rum. STIR lots more and add more ice.
comment: Made to appeal to drinkers who actually want a cocktail that tastes like Treacle. And it does.

name: Staffordshire Delight
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A modern day pick-me-up / hair-of-the-dog with a rich, enlivening bitter sweet bite.

name: The Dunaway
ingredients: ½ shot Cynar Ricetta Originale Artichoke Amaro Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A dry sherry-rich aperitif cocktail.

name: Maya Margarita
ingredients: 1 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Giffard Agave Sec liqueur
⅓ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Pink river salt rim & lime wedge
comment: A tasty Margarita with Grand Marnier, Agave Sec liqueur and orange juice.

name: The Prince of Wales Punch
ingredients: ¼ ring Pineapple (fresh) (cored, skinned and chopped)
¾ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
instructions: MUDDLE pineapple in base of shaker. Add next five ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. Float the port on drink.
comment: Fruity yet complex with the oak maturation of both spirits and liqueurs adding depth of flavour.

name: Grand 'O'
ingredients: 2¼ shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
1½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: POUR soda water into ice-filled glass to half fill. ADD lemon juice, orange juice and Grand Marnier. TOP with soda.
comment: A fruity, zesty, light summery cocktail. Tip - pouring the soda first makes this refreshingly juicy drink easier to mix due to the specific gravities of the ingredients.

name: Grand Sour
ingredients: 2 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice). SHAKE again with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The rich cognac and oranges flavours of Grand Marnier shine in this balanced and flavoursome sour.

name: Beuser & Angus Special
ingredients: ½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: A floral, aromatic and herbal Chartreuse flip.

name: Hey Hey Cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sidecar-like cocktail with a good balance between sweet (triple sec) and sour (lemon juice), fortified by cognac and smoothed by Lillet Blanc.

name: Italian Milk Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
⅛ shot Bepi Tosolini Grappa di Moscato
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The distinctive flavour of moscato grappa shines through in this milky drink, with amaretto adding rich almond notes and Galliano a touch of peppermint and aniseed.

name: Nelson's Blood Cocktail
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This carpet scary, appropriately named, blood red cocktail balances the rich fruitiness of port with the fortifying complexity of cognac. A popular drink in classic British pubs.

name: Netherland Cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: There will be those that call for this cocktail to be stirred. If you are going to deviate from the original, our advice would be to make this frothier by adding a dash of egg white.

name: Noblesse
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A light, sweet and sour, herbal and fruity aperitif cocktail.

name: Pisco Bell Ringer
ingredients: ⅛ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
2 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: RINSE chilled glass with apricot brandy (swirl liqueur round inside of glass to coat and then shake out excess). SHAKE other ingredients with ice and fine strain into apricot rinsed glass.
comment: Go easy on the bitters and this will be a delicate, aromatic pisco cocktail.

name: Procrastination Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅙ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A wet martini flavoured with copious amounts of limoncello (which slightly sweetens and adds surprisingly subtle lemon favours) and a dash of Chartreause which shines through.

name: Royal Toast
ingredients: ¾ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich cherry liqueur flavours are balanced by dry vermouth and lifted by vodka.

name: Sargasso
ingredients: ½ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This orange-red bitter sweet drink has a dry oaky complexity.

name: South Ireland Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice). Add ice, SHAKE again and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Smells of sticking plasters and uses Feijoa and Guinness. Only a Kiwi could create such a drink. Give it a try, it's not as crazy as it sounds.

name: Corn'n'Oil Cocktail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into-filled glass.
comment: Rum slightly sweetened and flavoured with the lime and clove flavours of falernum.

name: Bradford Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Chilled olive on stick or lemon zest twist
comment: More approachable than a stirred Dry Martini and downright soft compared to a Naked Martini.

name: Blue Lassi
ingredients: 1½ shot Ketel One Vodka (infused with vanilla)
½ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Baby blue creamy yoghurt with vanilla infused vodka, orange liqueur and aromatic rose water.

name: Bombay Lassi Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Ketel One Vodka (infused with vanilla)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE cardamom in base of shaker. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy vanilla yet balanced rather than sweet with hints of cardamom, ginger and lemon.

name: Pineapple Lassi Cocktail
instructions: MUDDLE cardamom and then pineapple in base of shaker. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy yoghurty cardamom and pineapple laced with vodka.

name: Raita Cocktail
instructions: MUDDLE cardamom, cumin and then cucumber in base of shaker. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh cucumber, mint and yoghurt with a hint of cardamom and cumin spice, laced with vodka.

name: Rosie Lassi Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy vanilla yoghurt with floral rose liqueur fortified with vodka.

name: Raspberry Lassi Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Raspberries & dust with cracked black pepper
comment: Rich creamy vanilla yoghurt with fresh raspberries and raspberry liqueur fortified with vodka.

name: Banana Smoothie (alcoholic)
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve immediately with straws.
comment: Packed with fruit, this creamy banana flavoured shake is 'hardened' with a double measure of vodka.

name: Raspberry Smoothie (Alcoholic )
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: BLEND ingredients with a scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve immediately with straws.
comment: This soft pink, creamy yoghurt drink is loaded with raspberry fruit and laced with vodka.

name: Strawberry Smoothie (Alcoholic)
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve immediately with straws.
comment: This radiantly coloured creamy strawberry yoghurt drink is sweetened with honey and 'hardened' with vodka.

name: Greek Piña Colada
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Giffard Premium Caribbean Pineapple Liqueur Buy from amazon
instructions: BLEND ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve immediately with straws.
comment: A yoghurt and rum based pineapple and coconut drink, and if your blender is sufficiently powerful, with tiny fragments of pineapple shrapnel.

name: Venetian
ingredients: 2 shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice filled glass.
comment: Burnished copper red and bitter sweet with Aperol, wine and a dash of elderflower, fruit liqueur and bitters.

name: Bramble
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. DRIZZLE liqueur over drink to create a 'bleeding' effect in the glass. Serve with short straws.
comment: One of the best and most popular drinks to come out of the 1980s.

name: Tonic Boom
instructions: POUR tonic water into old-fashioned glass. Then POUR gin into shot glass. Instruct drinker to hold gin-filled shot glass directly over surface of tonic water and drop shot into old-fashioned glass and consume.
comment: Essentially a gin and tonic bomb. To quote a Portobello Star regular, “the thinking man’s Jager Bomb”.

name: Bénédictine Conversion
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
¾ shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tequila and mezcal based with herbal and liqueur and thyme.

name: Pink Chihuahua
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Yes, this appropriately named almond margarita-like drink is pink and fluffy – due to being sweetened and made red with pomegranate syrup (in place of triple sec) and given a foamy head by the addition of egg white.

name: Pearlinstrum
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A delicate harmony of pear and elderflower given depth by vermouth and fortified with vodka.

name: Archibald Periscope
ingredients: 1 shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
¾ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with soda and then carefully FLOAT Rioja wine.
comment: Slightly sweet, long and refreshing. To quote the menu at Albert & Pearl where we discovered this cocktail, "a sight for sore eyes".

name: Cantaritos
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot Freshly squeezed ruby grapefruit juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
Top up with Three Cents Pink Grapefruit Soda
instructions: Submerge pot in cold water to clean the inside and wet the outside clay. This improves the appearance and keeps pot cold. POUR ingredients into ice-filled pot, STIR and serve with straws.
comment: Juicy (freshly squeezed orange, grapefruit and lime) and refreshing slightly salty tequila invigorated with sparkling grapefruit soda.

name: Milanese Breakfast Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: STIR marmalade with gin in base of shaker to dissolve marmalade. Add Campari and lemon juice, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with Prosecco.
comment: A fruity but dry aperitif drink served 'up' but with a hint of sparkle from prosecco.

name: Teaquila
ingredients: 2 shot Freshly brewed cold black English breakfast tea
1½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Mexican iced tea sweetened with honey.

name: Celery Gimlet
ingredients: ¼ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Chardonnay white wine vinegar
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Occupying the ground between the Gimlet and a Shrub with pleasing savoury celery notes adding interest.

name: Biblical Sidecar
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: MUDDLE cloves in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac and freshly squeezed orange juice warmed with ginger and clove spice.

name: Golden Ivy
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac stirred with rich berry flavours of muscat wine along with the relatively dry berry flavour of cranberry.

name: Messianic Cocktail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE cloves in stirring glass. Add other ingredients, STIR with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Ginger and orange delicately spiced with cloves and fortified with golden rum. You'll need to fine strain to catch the clove shrapnel or alternatively infuse cloves in your rum. Achieving the correct dilution is key to the success of this drink.

name: Miami Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light, refreshing and all too quaffable. Campari and orange bitters add depth of flavour.

name: The Holland House #2 (Craddock's London dry based)
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE pineapple in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Pineapple, maraschino, gin and vermouth makes for a dry fruit Aviation-style drink.

name: Dry Martini #7 (Sopping Wet 2:1.5 ratio)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Chilled olive on stick or lemon zest twist
comment: Herbal vermouth flavours pervade this Sopping Wet Martini.

name: Brandy Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass (without ice). TOP with soda.
comment: A refreshing and tasty dry drink: cognac and lemon balanced with a little sugar and lengthened with soda.

name: Dutch Blood and Sand
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
¾ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A light fragrant style of the classic cocktail usually Scotch whisky based.

name: Little Smith
ingredients: ½ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet but this apple cocktail is light and delicately spiced.

name: Creole Contentment
ingredients: 1 shot Blandy's Sercial 10 Year Old Dry Madeira
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: If using a sweeter Madeira such as Verdelho/Rainwater (medium dry) or Bual (medium sweet) you'll need to adjust this finely balanced cocktail. Even Baker himself says says it "needs a little trimming". However, dry Sercial Madeira works best to produce a finely balanced complex cocktail.

name: The Colonial Cooler
ingredients: ⅛ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: STIR first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP up with soda.
comment: Basically a Gin and It lengthened with soda and spiced with dashes of Amer Picon, Angostura bitters and orange curaçao.

name: Brandy Milk Punch
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: This traditional New Orleans hangover cure beats your bog-standard vanilla milkshake.

name: Brandy Smash
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint in base of shaker just enough to bruise. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sweetened cognac flavoured with mint. Simple but beautiful.

name: Brazen Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Giffard Parfait Amour Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Not for the faint hearted - a great combination of grassy bison vodka with violet Parfait Amour.

name: Brazilian Berry
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: MUDDLE fruit in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Serve with straws.
comment: This drink combines wine, cachaça and rich berry fruits.

name: Breakfast At Terrell's
ingredients: ¾ shot Mandarine Napoleon Grande Liqueur Imperiale
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: This creamy orange champagne cocktail is almost as smooth as a Sgroppino.

name: Sharman-Cox Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅓ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice). SHAKE again with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A foam-topped blue twist on the classic daiquiri served in a coupette glass, which as every schoolboy knows are shaped after Marie Antoinette’s breasts.

name: Shaky Pete’s Ginger Brew
instructions: Blitz BLEND the first three ingredients with two ice cubes for ten seconds. Fine strain into chilled glass and TOP with beer. See Origin for Pete's original homemade ginger syrup.
comment: Imagine a ginger flavoured shandy with a kick – pretty much describes this gin laced lemon and ginger flavoured beer-tail.

name: Bronx #1 (Original)
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo Maraschino cherry
comment: A serious, dry, complex cocktail. Less bitter than many of its era, but still challenging to more tender modern palates.

name: Foxy Lady
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice). SHAKE again with ice and strain to chilled cocktail glass.
comment: Best described as a strawberry gin sour, the herbal botanicals in the gin combine well with the sweet strawberry.

name: Dopo Cena
ingredients: 1 shot G. Miclo Kirsch Vieux Grande Reserve Eau de Vie
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
1 spoon Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water) (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice). SHAKE again with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Under the white head lies a dessert cocktail with aromatic cherry and marzipan flavours.

name: Green Park
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE basil in base of shaker (just to bruise). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Lime green in colour under a frothy head, lemon fresh and botanical with gin, basil and a hint of celery.

name: Punch Back
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
garnish: Pineapple wedge on rim with cherries on stick
comment: Cachaça is the raw, spirity love interest in this rum based coconut and lime punch.

name: Agua De Cuba
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅔ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: MUDDLE watermelon in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A light summery rum-based drink with fresh watermelon and subtle clove spice.

name: Beautiful Lady
ingredients: ¾ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
instructions: STIR first 2 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. FLOAT thin layer of lightly whipped cream.
comment: This dessert-style drink with cherry and chocolate combined under a layer of cream may be reminiscent of a black forest gateau, but the use of chocolate spirit rather than liqueur means it’s not too sweet.

name: Bridgetown Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed ruby grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicate and very slightly sweet with maraschino liqueur brilliantly balancing grapefruit juice.

name: Bushranger
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and stain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Slightly sweet, this complex cocktail combines flavours of red wine with subtle herbal notes and is fortified with light rum.

name: Eastern Promises
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
