comment: This rum-based drink was apparently inspired by the golden age of the cocktail, with aromatic mandarin, tart lime, bittersweet vermouth resulting in an elegant cocktail with a complex finish.

name: El Momento Perfecto
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅔ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
⅔ shot Byrrh Grand Quinquina Aromatized Wine
instructions: STIR over cubed ice and julep strain into heavy old fashioned glass over fresh ice.
comment: A rum and marmalade Negroni-like drink.

name: Elderflower Gin Fizz
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass (without ice). TOP with soda.
comment: Go easy with the size of Collins glass you use or this drink with become over diluted. Due to the lack of ice in the serve also ensure the soda  is well chilled and preferably use a frozen bottle of gin.

name: The Getaway (AKA Cynar Daiquiri)
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot Cynar Ricetta Originale Artichoke Amaro Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The bitter vegetal taste of Cynar turns this Daiquiri into a digestif.

name: The Lone Ranger
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Very slightly sweet tequila and lemon, lengthened and dried with brut champagne.

name: Moonwalk Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: POUR ingredients into chilled glass. TOP with champagne. (Build in glass like a classic Champagne Cocktail.)
garnish: Orange zest twist (spray & discard) & 1/4 orange slice on rim.
comment: Delicately sweetened Champagne with cognac and citrus flavours.

name: My Sherry Amore
ingredients: 1 shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A bitter-sweet, salmon pink, light, delicate balance of gin, herbal complexity, grapefruit and dry sherry.

name: Palmetto Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and stain into chilled glass.
comment: The orange bitters are key to balancing and adding depth to the equal parts aged rum and sweet vermouth. However, go easy with those dashes or bitter orange will dominate this complex cocktail.

name: Alaska #1 (Savoy Recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: We've added a shot of dry sherry as recommended by David Embury in his 1948 'Fine Art of Mixing Drinks'.

name: The Buck / Gin Buck
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: POUR first two ingredients into ice-filled glass and TOP with ginger ale. Stir and serve with straws.
comment: The Buck can be improved by adding a dash of liqueur appropriate to the spirit base. E.g. add a dash of Grand Marnier to a Brandy Buck.

name: Raspberry Daiquiri
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 1/2 scoop (6oz) crushed ice and serve in chilled glass.
comment: A crowd-pleasing, slightly sweet blended fruity Daiquiri.

name: Buck's Fizz
instructions: POUR half the champagne into a chilled glass, then the orange juice and finally the rest of the champagne.
comment: A very simple cocktail, but when made with freshly squeezed oranges straight from the refrigerator this is a great brunch drink.

name: La Tour Eiffel
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Suze gentian liqueur Buy from amazon
1 dash La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bitter sweet cognac-influenced palate with lingering flavours of liquorice root, honey, pine and eucalyptus from the Suze.

name: Young Man Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This particular Young Man is essentially a cognac-based Sweet Manhattan with a splash of orange curaçao – unsurprisingly, the result is slightly sweetened cognac with a hint of orange.

name: Stout Fellow
ingredients: 1 shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
⅙ shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: In a similar style to an Espresso Martini but with very different ingredients including Guinness stout and coffee liqueur in place of espresso coffee.

name: Pale Charlie
ingredients: ¾ shot Rutte Sloe Gin liqueur
¾ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
2 dash La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: SHAKE first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ale.
comment: Zesty, fruity and refreshing with berry and stone fruit accompanying lime and grapefruit with hoppy pale ale.

name: Buena Vida
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: The fruits combine brilliantly with the tequila and spice comes courtesy of Angostura.

name: Honey Vodka Collins
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: STIR honey with vodka in base of shaker until honey dissolves. ADD other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The honey and lemon combo are reminiscent of a toddy but here served long and iced with cleansing vodka.

name: Trinidad Especial
ingredients: ⅓ shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
1 shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This deep reddy-brown bittersweet drink is based upon sweet almond syrup balancing bitter notes from the Angostura and lime tartness. With a whole shot of Angostura this cocktail is most unusual.

name: Sanguinello Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Bitter Campari notes are balanced by sweet, lemony limoncello liqueur with blood orange juice adding citrus freshness.

name: Le Jardin
ingredients: ⅛ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE first 7 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: This salmon pink cocktail combines gin, maraschino liqueur, fresh blueberries, lemon juice and apple juice with rose champagne to create a refreshing harmonious blend. The inspiration behind the drink is a quote by Nicolas Gilsoul, “A garden, like champagne, is a filter, a medium through which the person walking in it awakens his senses and reveals the depth of his emotions.”

name: Rose Memoire
instructions: SHAKE first 2 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: This unusual riff on the classic mimosa unusually calls for redcurrant jelly and sweet clementine juice, topped with rosé champagne.

name: Franco Russian Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne and lightly stir.
comment: This long refreshing berry and champagne cocktail is a riff on Dick Bradsell’s Russian Spring Punch.

name: Sicilian Orange Spritz
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueur into glass. ADD ice. Top with soda.
comment: Zesty, bittersweet blood orange with Prosecco effervescence.

name: Biscotti Spritz
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueurs into glass. ADD ice. Top with soda.
garnish: Biscotti biscuit across top of glass
comment: Hazelnut and butterscotch liqueurs flavour this Prosecco based spritz. Great when complemented by a biscotti biscuit.

name: Lychee & Elderflower Spritz
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueurs into glass. Add ice and TOP with soda.
comment: As the apt name suggests, this slightly sweet spritz is flavoured with lychee and elderflower liqueurs. East meets west in Italy.

name: Parma Violet Spritz
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueur into glass. ADD ice. TOP with soda.
garnish: Small pack of Parma Violet sweets
comment: Inspired by and garnished with mini Parma Violet sweets, this spritz is flavoured with crème de violette liqueur.

name: Peach & Apricot Spritz
ingredients: 1 shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueurs into glass. ADD ice. Top with soda.
comment: This Prosecco-based spritz is fruity but not overly sweet. Peach and apricot sit brilliantly with the sparkling wine, think Bellini with a hint of apricot.

name: Rossini Spritz
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and Rossini mix into glass. ADD ice. Top with soda.
comment: Perhaps best described as a Strawberry Bellini, sweet strawberry flavours are tamed with the gentle acidity of Prosecco.

name: Bull's Blood
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Orange fruitiness fortified with cognac and white rum. Fruity but dry.

name: Lemonade Spritz (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: ⅕ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
3½ shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: A minty real lemonade. A seriously refreshing non-alcoholic summery drink.

name: Bellini Peach Spritz
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass.
garnish: Lemon slice or fresh peach wedge
comment: Basically a Bellini served on the rocks.

name: Apple & Blackberry Spritz
ingredients: 1 shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueurs into glass. ADD ice. Top with soda.
comment: The name aptly describes the drink.

name: Sour Cherry Spritz
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR prosecco and liqueurs into glass. Add ice. TOP with soda.
comment: The name aptly describes the drink.

name: Singapore Sling (D’s recipe)
ingredients: ⅓ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅙ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
⅙ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 9 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and lightly stir.
comment: This doesn’t follow classic ‘Singapore Sling’ proportions or ingredients, nor does it follow what the modern day Raffles day hotel claims is the original formula, but it steals elements from all of these to produce a tall, fruity, balanced cocktail.

name: Gimlet Cocktail (Charles H. Baker's 1939 recipe)
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Boozy and very subtly flavoured and edging very slightly towards being sweet.

name: Pimm's Spritz
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly stir.
comment: As the name suggests, this cocktail is inspired by and combines elements of both the classic Venetian Spritz and England’s Pimm’s Cup. The result is a lightly sparkling and very refreshing aperitif cocktail.

name: Dead Parrot Colada
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with crushed ice and serve with straws.
garnish: Small stuffed dead parrot that’s passed on, no more, expired and gone to meet 'is maker, a stiff, bereft of life, rests in peace, pushing up the daisies, off the twig, kicked the bucket, shuffled off 'is mortal coil, run down the curtain and joined the bleedin' choir invisible. An ex-parrot. And preferably one with “lovely plumage”.
comment: Gin and delicate maraschino cherry with orange and lemon, coconut and a hint of Norwegian aquavit character.

name: Almond Pina Colada
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: As the name suggests this tall shaken cocktail has strong flavours of pineapple and almond.

name: Hot Gin Toddy
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Place bar spoon in empty (ideally warmed glass). POUR all ingredients into glass and then STIR.
comment: Warmed and sweetened gin with a hint of orange. (Others prefer a grapefruit zest garnish but there is no accounting.)

name: Mezcal Negroni
ingredients: 1½ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and STIR.
comment: This smoky mezcal influenced Negroni is an interesting take on the classic which will be appreciated by mezcal aficionados.

name: Blanche Corpse Reviver
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Blanche absinthe sits surprisingly well in this riff on the classic Corpse Reviver.

name: Blanche Refresher
ingredients: 1 shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
½ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Drizzle Green Chartreuse all over the top of the drink.
comment: Challenging ingredients, including a whole shot of absinthe, combine to make a very approachable, aptly refreshing cocktail.

name: Cosmopolitan cocktail (Toby Cecchini's recipe)
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This 2,1,1,1 original Cosmopolitan is slightly on the tart side of balanced with the citrus flavoured vodka shining over the other ingredients.

name: Moscow Mule (D's recipe)
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first four ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled mug/glass. TOP with ginger beer and crushed ice.
comment: A dash of bitters adds extra interest to this classic with a dash of ginger liqueur boosting the ginger flavour and adding the merest touch of sweetness to balance the use of bitters.

name: Sticky Toffee Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Teichenné Butterscotch Schnapps Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Given the name and the ingredients in this indulgent champagne cocktail, it is surprisingly dry and complex.

name: Melon Maple Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE melon in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda water.
comment: Light, fruity and refreshing. Not overly sweet.

name: Watermelon Batida
ingredients: ⅔ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: MUDDLE watermelon in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Watermelon adds fruity notes to this creamy Batida.

name: Smoky Mocha Spritz
ingredients: 1½ shot Beavertown Smog Rocket Smoked Porter
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and stir.
garnish: Two segments of dark Toblerone chocolate on the rim
comment: Coffee and chocolate flavours with a faint smokiness, invigorated with sparkling wine.

name: King of Orange
ingredients: ¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist to resemble a crown
comment: Slightly on the bitter side of bittersweet with the richness of Grand Marnier balancing Campari and lemon juice.

name: Doctor No.3
ingredients: 1½ shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tangy Swedish Punch freshened with orange and lemon juice.

name: Doctor No.4
ingredients: 1½ shot Carlshamns Flaggpunsch Original Swedish Punsch
½ shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A characterful Daiquiri - pungent Jamaican rum combines with tangy Swedish Punch balanced by lime juice.

name: Wordsmith
ingredients: ¾ shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
¾ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
¾ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Punchy pot-still rum with the equally powerful notes of Green Chartreuse supported by Maraschino liqueur with lime zestiness. Powerful in every respect.

name: Next to Last Word
ingredients: ¾ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A floral riff on the classic Last Word with maraschino to the fore.

name: Butterscotch Cocktail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Teichenné Butterscotch Schnapps Liqueur
¾ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet and suckable.

name: Electro Batida
ingredients: ⅓ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
¼ shot Roasted hazelnut sugar syrup
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled coconut shell or collins glass.
garnish: Desiccated coconut and dehydrated lime wheel
comment: Cachaça and coconut water with a touch of hazelnut, lime and subtly smoky mezcal.

name: The Bomb
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
⅛ shot St. Elizabeth Allspice Dram
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A sherry-led aperitif cocktail. Don’t be put off by its murky appearance.

name: Watermelon Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE watermelon in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Just as it says on the tin – this is a very fruity Margarita.

name: Webber Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This blackcurrant fruity cocktail has a citrus zing courtesy of the citrus vodka base and the addition of fresh lime juice, the sourness of which adds balance.

name: Byzantine
ingredients: ½ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: MUDDLE basil in base of shaker. Add other ingredients apart from tonic water, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: This fruity, herbal drink is even better made the way Douglas originally intended, with basil infused gin instead of muddled leaves.

name: Trident
ingredients: 1 shot Cynar Ricetta Originale Artichoke Amaro Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment:
Bone dry and boozy, this cocktail is aimed at those who have a penchant for both sherry and aquavit, not to mention bittersweet artichoke liqueurs - hardly mass market then. Nor are Aston Martin cars but I want one.

Be warned - use the wrong sherry and this drink falls apart - don’t be tempted to sub manzanilla with a fino.

name: Kingston Negroni
ingredients: 1 shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: The huge character of pungent rum is matched with a bittersweet liqueur and sweet vermouth combo. Not for everyone but a Negroni riff worth trying.

name: Brits Spritz
ingredients: 2 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and stir.
garnish: Squeeze grapefruit wedge into drink & add cucumber slice
comment: An elderflower Spritz with depth of flavour and British character courtesy of Kamm & Sons.

name: Beetroot & Vanilla Daiquiri
ingredients: 2½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Just what it says on the tin, only the beetroot pervades this otherwise classic Daiquiri more than the vanilla. Perhaps also consider using vanilla infused rum.

name: The Dandy
ingredients: ¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: STIR first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: Bénédictine adds both saffron flavour and vivid yellow colour to this cognac based cocktail with maraschino contributing fruity notes. Champagne dries and provides effervescence and body to this well-balanced cocktail.

name: C C Kazi
ingredients: 1¾ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Rude Cosmo without the liqueur.

name: Colletti Royale
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE first 6 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with Champagne.
comment: Sweet and sour and very fruity - like a good Valentine’s date.

name: Floradora
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¾ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger ale and lightly stir.
comment: This pink, gin-based drink is light and fruity with lime juice balancing sweet raspberry liqueur and lengthened with ginger ale.

name: Entente Cordiale Cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This gin laced cocktail is flavoured with apricot liqueur which is balanced and made more complex by dry vermouth. A dash of orange bitters and a light lemon zest twist subtly serve to unify all. (Go easy with the bitters and zest.)

name: Londoner (Wood's recipe)
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich raspberry fruit liqueur balanced by pink grapefruit and lime juice, with gin fortifying and adding complexity. The flavour is reminiscent of a Bramble served straight-up.

name: Cable Car
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Vanilla and spice from the rum interact with the orange liqueur in this balanced, Daiquiri style drink.

name: Chilcano de Pisco
ingredients: 2 shot BarSol Supremo Mosto Verde Italia Pisco
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly stir.
comment: Pisco and ginger ale made more interesting by a splash of lime juice and a few dashes of Amargo Chuncho bitters.

name: Milano Torino (Mi-To) Cocktail
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass and stir.
comment: The drink that led to both the Negroni and the Americano.

name: Cactus Banger
ingredients: 1 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A golden, sunny looking and sunny tasting drink.

name: Grande Elixir cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
½ shot Honey water (3 honey to 1 water)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: The name refers to the inclusion of Yellow Chartreuse which combines well with cachaça in this drink with honey and lemon juice.

name: East 8 Hold-up cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
⅔ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅛ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Vodka based, fruity and bittersweet with pineapple and passion fruit.

name: Better & Better
ingredients: 1½ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
½ shot Smith & Cross Traditional Pot Still Jamaican Rum
¼ shot John D. Taylor's Velvet Falernum Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Initially strong and punchy, but as the name suggests, as the ice melts dilution makes this drink better and better.

name: Dirty(ish) Banana cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop crushed ice.
comment: Coffee liqueur, banana and cream laced with cachaça and blended to a creamy icy consistency.

name: Willi Wonka cocktail
ingredients: ⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅓ shot Le Sirop de Monin Chocolat Blanc (White Chocolate) Sugar Syrup
instructions: Muddle strawberries in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
garnish: White Chocolate square and half strawberry
comment: Cachaca and strawberry with subtle hints of lime and chocolate.

name: Coco Milky Way cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
⅓ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 6oz scoop of crushed ice and pour into glass.
garnish: Lemon zest & slice of Milky Way chocolate bar
comment: Cachaça laced pineapple, coconut and cream with hints of almond and hazelnut.

name: Harvard cocktail #2
ingredients: 1 shot Byrrh Grand Quinquina Aromatized Wine
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Byrrh combines well with cognac in this variation on the classic Harvard.

name: The Med
ingredients: ⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE basil in base of shaker. Add next 3 ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: A long summery drink with basil and the distinctive flavour of Greek mastiha.

name: Fresh Cocktail
ingredients: 2 inch English cucumber peeled (cored, skinned and chopped)
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE cucumber in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The distinctive fresh flavour of mastiha paired with cucumber, gin and lemon juice.

name: Pink Khaleesi
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: MUDDLE peppercorns in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Pretty in pink but with a hint of spice and the distinctive Greek flavour of mastiha.

name: Night Vision
ingredients: ⅓ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: Cachaça, carrot and tonic water make for a very interesting combo in this drink which is “naturally” sweetened with agave syrup. Perhaps more health shop/juice bar than speakeasy but unusually tasty all the same.

name: Cosmopolis cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A riff on a Cosmopolitan with the distinctive Greek influence of mastiha.

name: Caipirovska
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lime wedges in the base of shaker to release juice and oils in its skin. Add vodka and sugar. SHAKE with 6oz scoop crushed ice and pour all without straining into glass.
comment: Vodka replaces cachaça in this Caipirinha-style drink.

name: Ionian Spritz cocktail
ingredients: 1 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly stir.
comment: The Greeks and Italians are separated by the Ionian Sea, in this Spritz both countries come together with Italian Prosecco and Greek Mastiha.

name: Mastiha Mojito
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. CHURN (stir) with bar spoon. Fill glass with more crushed ice and CHURN some more. Keep adding ice and churning until drink fills glass. Serve with straws.
comment: Mastiha adds a distinctively Greek fresh flavour to this otherwise fairly classic mojito.

name: Mastiha & Tonic
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly stir.
comment: The very distinctive taste of mastiha with freshening tonic water.

name: Mastiha Sour
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Some use a whole shot of lemon juice and correspondingly a tad more sugar. It’s also common to add a dash of Angostura bitters but we prefer the refreshing flavour of mastiha unhindered.

name: Caipiruva
ingredients: ½ shot Demerara sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lime wedges and grapes in base of shaker to release juices. Add cachaça and sugar. SHAKE with 6oz scoop crushed ice and pour all without straining into glass.
comment: A grape juice laced twist on the Caipirinha.

name: Black Jack
ingredients: 1½ shot Byrrh Grand Quinquina Aromatized Wine
½ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: For us Brits this cocktail rekindles memories of the tuck shop and a black tongue from chewing on far too many Black Jacks. Happily, booze now takes the place of the sugar rush.

name: Byrrh Cassis
ingredients: 3½ shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
1½ shot Byrrh Grand Quinquina Aromatized Wine
¾ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass in the following order and lightly stir.
comment: Rich berry and red wine flavours are lengthened and enlivened with sparkling water.

name: Le Fizz cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
2 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with chilled soda.
comment: A poor man’s champagne cocktail. Refreshing and, providing consumed whilst still cold, unknowingly boozy.

name: Keyser Söze cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Suze gentian liqueur Buy from amazon
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Gin and cognac sit surprisingly well together as base ingredients with gentian and citrus freshness.

name: Le Sang Et Sable
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Lemon zest twist (discarded) & Luxardo maraschino cherry
comment: Reminiscent of a cognac-based Blood & Sand.

name: Great Northern
ingredients: ¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Honey water (3 honey to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Your choice of honey will greatly influence this drink which harnesses the character of aquavit to great effect with white wine and citrusy notes.

name: Foghorn Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
3 dash La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Triple sec sweetens dry gin with zesty orange, Lillet adds dry complex wine notes and a few dashes of absinthe contribute subtle anise and fennel.

name: La Vendangeuse
ingredients: 1½ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Lemon zest twist (discarded) & grapes on stick
comment: Depending on the ripeness of your grapes, and the sweetness of your palate, you may want to stretch to half a shot sugar syrup. Strike the right balance and you’ll be rewarded with a medley of white grapes, white wine and botanical gin freshness with faint, cleansing zesty citrus.

name: Smokin' Paloma
ingredients: 1½ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
Top up with Three Cents Pink Grapefruit Soda
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with grapefruit soda.
comment: Mezcal adds subtle smoky complexity to a classic Paloma.

name: Smokin' Hot Paloma
ingredients: 1 shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
¾ shot Menjurje de Ancho Reyes Chile liqueur
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
Top up with Three Cents Pink Grapefruit Soda
instructions: SHAKE first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with grapefruit soda.
comment: Mezcal provides a subtle hint of smokiness while chili liqueur adds hot spice. The other guests to Paloma's party bring fruity honeyed sweetness.

name: What's Up, Doc?
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Carrot juice gives this drink an orange hue and combines surprisingly well with gin. Extra flavour and spice comes courtesy of ginger liqueur, lemon juice and cinnamon.

name: Cloud 9
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
½ shot Suze gentian liqueur Buy from amazon
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A trio of big flavours (tequila, Lillet Blanc and gentian liqueur) come together harmoniously.

name: Pablo à Paris cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot Martinique agricole rhum vieux (extra aged)
⅔ shot Suze gentian liqueur Buy from amazon
2 dash La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A dry and angular aperitif with robust flavours of aged rhum agricole and gentian liqueur, lengthened and tamed by dry vermouth with dashes of absinthe.

name: Batida
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. Or alternatively, BLEND all ingredients with crushed ice.
comment: Thick and creamy with fortifying underlying cachaça spirit.

name: Popeye Sour
ingredients: ¼ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: MUDDLE spinach in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Spinach gives this cachaça-based cocktail a vibrant green colour while its flavour is influenced by lime, ginger and rich almond.

name: Mure & Lavender Batida
ingredients: ½ shot Le Sirop de Monin Lavandie - Lavender Sugar Syrup
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: As the name suggests this creamy Batida is flavoured with blackberries and lavender.

name: Great Chase
ingredients: ⅕ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
3 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass and stir. (Rather than measuring what is around a barspoon of lemon juice, you may prefer to gently squeeze the lemon wedge garnish prior dropping into the drink.
comment: A lightly elderflower, relatively dry and refreshing spritz-style drink.

name: Elder Fashion
instructions: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass and STIR.
comment: Boozy and cleansing with gin, floral elderflower with zesty citrus.

name: Sidecar No. Blue
ingredients: ¾ shot Lejay Curacao Bleu (blue curacao) Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: One orange liqueur, blue curacao, replaces another, triple sec, to give this Sidecar an aquamarine hue.

name: Family and Friends Barrel Sling
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅓ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
garnish: Orange zest twist, pineapple wedge & cherry

name: Cherry Mojito
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water

name: Cherry Ginger Cocktail
ingredients: 1⅓ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)

name: Heering Negroni
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth

name: Velours de France
ingredients: ⅔ shot Lightly spiced vanilla liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into a chilled glass.
garnish: Demerara sugar rim & lemon zest twist (discarded)
comment: Almond and vanilla liqueur combine harmoniously with cognac with lime juice and bitters adding freshness and balance.

name: History & Nobility
ingredients: ¾ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
¼ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac stirred with orange and apricot liqueurs along with a dash of orange bitters. The original recipe calls for two dashes but go too heavy with your bitters and this subtle drink will be wrecked. Achieving perfect dilution is also key, hence our adding half a shot chilled water (ice allowing of course).

name: L'esprit de l'escalier
ingredients: ⅔ shot Absenteroux Vermouth a l'Absinthe
⅓ shot Poire William eau de vie
⅙ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass (or in place of ice use cold over frozen river stones to chill to avoid dilution from ice).
comment: “The spirit of the staircase” is short and boozy. Cognac flavours shine with hints of absinthe, pear and banana.

name: Blue Nightcap
ingredients: ⅓ shot Espresso coffee (freshly made & hot)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Two different sherries, honey and coffee combine with cognac and walnut bitters to produce an after dinner cocktail.

name: Velvet Roof
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich berry notes and subtle ginger compliment cognac freshened with lemon and dry aperitif.

name: Black Diamond #2
ingredients: ¾ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac, vermouth and elderflower liqueur combine harmoniously in this short, boozy cocktail.

name: Papa Noel
ingredients: ⅓ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Cinnamon stick (& originally with a sugar rim)
comment: Cognac, aromatic dry vermouth, rich honey, lemon juice and crème de banana with a dash of Angostura.

name: The Southern Alliance
ingredients: ⅔ shot Punt E Mes vermouth
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ spoon Balsamic vinegar of Modena
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass (preferably a large chunk of block ice).
garnish: Orange zest twist & Luxardo maraschino cherries
comment: Cognac shines with a delicate fruitiness in this dryish, bittersweet stirred cocktail served on the rocks.

name: Desire
ingredients: ⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot AquaRiva Organic Agave Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: An elderflower influenced cognac sour sweetened with agave nectar and served on-the-rocks.

name: Rachel
ingredients: ⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
⅙ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda water and drizzle crème de cassis on surface of drink
comment: Subtle lychee notes shine through this long refreshing cocktail with cognac, lemon and a drizzle of crème de cassis.

name: Preserve Nippon
ingredients: ⅚ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Gently MUDDLE shisho leaf in base of shaker (just to bruise), add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A vanilla lime cognac sour with Shisho leaf aromatics.

name: Seventh Son
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
Top up with Budweiser Budvar Pilsner
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. Carefully pour beer to FLOAT on top of drink.
comment: Cognac forms the base of this cocktail which resembles a luxurious glass of beer, and indeed beer tops the drink. Rich cherry and rose lightly sweeten.

name: L'Anniversaire (The Birthday)
ingredients: ⅔ shot Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich yet bittersweet with Campari providing subtle bitter notes. A good after digestive.

name: Quitting Ordinary
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
½ spoon Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Earl Grey tea tannins balance rich crème de cassis in this bittersweet, aperitif cocktail.

name: Fedora Sour
ingredients: ⅔ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: As David says of his drink, “Much like its namesake garment this drink is simultaneously sharp and smooth; and whilst it's rather cool, it's also likely to keep your head warm.”

name: Sunny Side Up
ingredients: ½ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
⅓ shot Aperitivo Cocchi Americano Bianco
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Bittersweet zesty citrus and cognac with aromatic wine.

name: A Few of My Favourite Things
ingredients: ⅓ shot Aperol Aperitivo by Fratelli Barbieri
⅙ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Bittersweet with zesty citrus, rich sherry, cognac and faint herbal Chartreuse.

name: Red Head
ingredients: ⅙ shot Lejay Creme de Fraise (Strawberry) Liqueur
⅙ shot Le Sirop de Monin Lavandie - Lavender Sugar Syrup
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A bittersweet aperitif style cocktail with light strawberry and delicate lavender notes.

name: Berry Flip
ingredients: ⅔ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
1⅔ shot Stone's Original Green Ginger Wine
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A most unusual cognac-laced flip with rich blackcurrant and lingering ginger spice. Slightly on the sweet side.

name: French Riviera
ingredients: ½ shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Honey water (3 honey to 1 water)
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Cognac provides the French influence and golden rum the sunny warmth with flavours of apricot, honey and lemon.

name: Pleasure to Tell
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅙ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into glass.
garnish: Orange zest twist & Luxardo maraschino cherry sprayed with chocolate bitters
comment: A stirred cognac-based after dinner drink with rich cherry notes and subtle almond and chocolate, freshened with orange oils.

name: Cherry Velvet
ingredients: ⅔ shot Dopo Teatro Cocchi Vermouth Amaro
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Rich Pedro Ximénez sherry and Italian amaro add complexity and depth of flavour to luxurious cognac (Mickael’s original spec calls for Martell Cordon Bleu).

name: The Sun King
ingredients: ¾ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
½ shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅙ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Jay explained the origins of this drink as follows, “Whist on holiday in the south of France this summer I discovered a fig tree growing on the riverside near our Chateau. During dinner my family challenged me to make a drink with the figs. I raided the cupboards and found Martell VSOP, chocolate liqueur, tawny port and drinking chocolate. The rest is History! I hope you enjoy it!”

name: Cordial Inviter
ingredients: ⅔ shot Crème de pêche (peach) liqueur
½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Peach liqueur adds subtle orchard fruit notes to cognac with dry vermouth balancing and added complex wine and botanical complexity.

name: Le Traite des Pyrenees (The Treaty of the Pyrenees)
instructions: SMOKE the inside of glass with a lightly fragrant cigar and cover. STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into cigar smoked glass.
comment: Rich and flavoursome Pedro Ximénez sherry stirred with cognac bitters and delicately influenced by cigar smoke

name: Velvet Seine
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Spot 2 drops of Angostura bitters on surface of drink
comment: Reminiscent of a French Martini without the pineapple juice but with balancing lemon sourness and an even thicker creamy foamy head thanks to the addition of egg white.

name: Derniere Minute (Last Minute)
ingredients: 2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac stirred with rich herbal and heather honey Drambuie, along with aromatised wine. Aromatic bitters add complexity depth.

name: L'apocalypse Ultime (The ultimate Apocalypse)
ingredients: ½ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
⅓ shot L'Esprit De June Liqueur
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
2 dash Dr. Adam Elmegirab's Boker's Bitters
instructions: STIR first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne
comment: This cognac and champagne cocktail is dry and boozy with hints of zesty orange.

name: Early Evening Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass (no ice in glass). POUR soda into drink slowly from a height in order to build a (Ramos Gin Fizz style) thick foamy head. Serve with a straw.
garnish: Lemon zest twist (discard) Lemon wedge & Luxardo maraschino cherry.
comment: Cognac, chartreuse, sloe gin and lemon juice served in a tall foaming fizz – its name inspired by the Morning Glory Fizz.

name: Charentes Cocktail
ingredients: ⅚ shot Pineau des Charentes rouge
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of mixing glass. Add other ingredients, STIR with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: White grape juice fortified with cognac and lightly sweetened by pineau des charentes with faint hints of chocolate.

name: Charentes
ingredients: ⅔ shot Pineau des Charentes rouge
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅕ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Kummel’s caraway flavours heavily influence this unusual cognac based cocktail with Pineau De Charentes and lemon juice.

name: Caribbean Breeze
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A long drink with bags of tangy fruit flavours.

name: Brandy Club Cocktail
ingredients: ⅔ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Orange & lemon grated zest mixed with caster sugar rim
comment: Cognac and zesty orange curacao with sherry. The sugary rim is essential to the balance of this drink.

name: Chocolat a l'orange (Orange Chocolate)
ingredients: ⅓ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into a large brandy balloon over a chunk of block ice.
comment: Cognac stirred with aromatised wine, rich orange liqueur with subtle chocolate, cinnamon and zesty orange.

name: Grape Expectations
ingredients: ⅔ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: POUR all ingredients into glass with two-thirds crushed ice and SWIZZLE. Top with crushed ice and serve with a straw.
comment: A rose, Sauvignon Blanc wine, apple and lemon Cognac Swizzle. Fruity, floral and refreshing.

name: IS talking
ingredients: ⅔ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR first ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic.
comment: A cognac and genever gin and tonic with a sweet zesty orange influence.

name: Coffee Thyme
ingredients: ⅚ shot Espresso coffee (freshly made & hot)
⅙ shot Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled ice.
comment: A cognac based Espresso Martini with herbal hints of Fernet Branca and thyme.

name: Nouvelle Histoire (New Story)
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Green mint (menthe verte) syrup
2 dash La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A refreshing citrusy and minty cognac cocktail.

name: Elixir De Longue Vie (Elixir of Long Life)
ingredients: ½ shot Edmond Briottet Crème de Châtaigne Liqueur
½ shot Pineau des Charentes blanc
⅙ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Chestnut, pineau de charente and chartreuse combine with cognac to create a most unusual cocktail with zesty lemon freshness.

name: Cherry Blossom #2
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
1⅔ shot Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 5 ingredients with ice and strain into. Top with soda and prosecco.
comment: Refreshing citrusy cherry fortified with cognac.

name: Harry Dean Stanton
ingredients: ⅓ shot Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: The choice and generosity of dash of chocolate bitters is key to the success of this boozy after dinner cocktail. Nail this and the chocolate amplifies fig and raison notes.

name: The Corpse's Whiskers
ingredients: ⅓ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
⅓ shot Lillet Blanc French aperitif wine
⅓ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
⅙ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
⅔ fresh Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Demerara sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredient with ice just a few times, and then THROW a further 3 times, before fine straining into chilled glass.
comment: Mickey Britton, the creator of this drink describes it as “the missing link between three classic cocktails: Corpse reviver #2, a Satan's Whiskers and the infamous Sidecar."

name: Rosa Picante Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Silver Tequila (green seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A refreshing Margarita, with subtle ginger, pepper spice and rose notes. You can subsitute half a barspoon of jalapeno oil in place of the jalapeno slice. We found that chili liqueur also works well.

name: V.S.M. Flip
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chocolate sprayed glass.
garnish: Spray glass with gold chocolate spray & grate dark chocolate over drink.
comment: Creamy and velvety chocolate, coffee and cognac.

name: Caribbean Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Red in colour and innocent looking, this flavoursome drink sure packs a punch.

name: The Burly French Man
ingredients: ⅙ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
⅔ shot Chartreuse Verte (Green Chartreuse) Liqueur
instructions: RINSE chilled glass with absinthe and set to one side. STIR other ingredients with ice and strain into absinthe rinsed glass.
comment: Boozy and served Sazerac-style, cognac with powerful Chartreuse herbal notes and faintly jammy fruit.

name: A L'Ancienne du Bois (A woody Old Fashioned)
ingredients: ⅓ shot Toschi Nocello Walnut Liqueur de Noix
4 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: MUDDLE cherries with bitters and maple syrup in base of glass. Add 3 ice cubes and STIR. Add cognac and 3 more ice cubes and STIR again. Add walnut liqueur and 2 more ice cubes and STIR some more.
comment: Despite the name, this Old Fashioned style drink is more fruity and nutty than it is woody, but it’s tasty all the same.

name: XOXO
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass (preferably block ice).
comment: A rich, chocolaty after dinner drink with cognac, pedro ximénez sherry, chocolate and orange liqueurs.

name: Saronno's Sweetheart
ingredients: ⅔ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Cognac and almond with lemon, apricot and rhubarb.

name: French Diamond
ingredients: ⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This citrusy cognac lased cocktail is fruity and lightly sweet with maple syrup, lemon and orange juice.

name: Chanteloup Champagne Flip
ingredients: ⅙ shot Giffard Parfait Amour Liqueur
⅙ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 7 ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
garnish: Mint sprig tip & dust with freshly grated nutmeg
comment: Complex and dry with faint rich raisiny sherry and floral notes.

name: Bakewell Tart Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Sweet and sour and flavoured exactly as the name suggests.

name: Suit & Tai
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients and strain into glass filled with crushed ice and serve with short straws.
comment: A Tiki-styled drink based on aged rum and cognac with lime juice, orange liqueur and almond syrup.

name: Heard It Through The Grapevine
ingredients: ⅙ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicate and wonderfully complex.

name: Soir d'Ete (Summer Evening)
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cold camomile tea (infused with lavender)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR in all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. (Or strain into ice-filled old-fashioned glass.)
garnish: Lemon zest twist and fresh lavender sprig/dried lavender blossom
comment: Fruity cognac with delicate floral tea notes.

name: Jersey Rose
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
3 dash Dr. Adam Elmegirab's Aphrodite Bitters
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP up with cider and add bitters onto foam for aroma.
comment: Cognac laced bittersweet strawberry, pomegranate and cider.

name: Grapefruit Soda (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: 1 shot Freshly squeezed ruby grapefruit juice
5 shot Three Cents Pink Grapefruit Soda
instructions: POUR ingredients into ice-filled glass and lightly stir.
comment: Superbly refreshing and not at all sweet. A great drink for a sunny afternoon.

name: Amsterdamage
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A genever-based Wet Martini with an orange influence courtesy of triple sec.

name: B-Cherry Lady
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
garnish: Tarragon, lemon chips and red chili pepper

name: The Golden Sakura
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
3 dash Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup

name: The Sweetcar
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Le Sirop de Monin Lavandie - Lavender Sugar Syrup

name: Caipi-Tea-Ni
ingredients: 1⅓ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
garnish: Spray with Tapii tea aromatic bitter

name: Cambodian Coley
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
¼ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
1 spoon Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur
garnish: Spritz Kampot pepper tincture, 2 lemon swaths.

name: Mount Pleasant
ingredients: 2 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
¼ shot Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur

name: Serendipity
ingredients: 1⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅓ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice

name: Best Friend
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅔ shot Becherovka Original (Carlsbad Becher) Liqueur
Top up with Sparkling mineral water

name: Rose & Marcel
ingredients: 1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

name: Cherry Heaven
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice

name: Bloody Cherry
ingredients: ⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice

name: Tiny Tectur
ingredients: 1⅓ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

name: Rubik's Cube
ingredients: 1⅔ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

⅔ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
⅔ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
garnish: Plum powder around the glass. Garnish with orange peel and one cherry cooked with Heering liqueur.

name: Le Temps Des Cerises
ingredients: ⅚ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur

name: Secret Clover
ingredients: 1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
garnish: Marzipan flavoured with cherry and honey.

name: Hello Dolly
ingredients: ½ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅓ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth

name: The Bramble Sling
ingredients: ⅚ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

name: Sin and Sand
ingredients: 1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur

name: The Country Girl

name: Blood from a Stone

⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice

⅙ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)

name: Hard Candy
ingredients: 1 shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
⅓ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)

name: Timeless 1818

½ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)

name: Novelist Spy
ingredients: 1⅓ shot Del Maguey VIDA de San Luis del Rio 100% agave blanco mezcal Buy from amazon
⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)

name: San Juan Sling-A-Ling

1 shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup

name: Heering Daiquiri

⅔ shot Pierre Ferrand Ancienne Methode Dry Curacao
⅔ shot Cherry Heering cherry brandy liqueur
⅔ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice

name: Cherrita Pie
