comment: A fruity drink to upset glass washers throughout the land.

name: Flirtini #1
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: It's a French Martini - hard not to like.

name: Flirtini #2
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A flirtatious little number that slips down easily.

name: Floral Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This aptly named gin Martini is soft but dry.

name: Daiquiri No.1 (El Floridita style)
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅛ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 6oz scoop of crushed ice. Pour into glass and serve.
comment: Great on a hot day, but the coldness masks much of the flavour evident when this drink is served 'up' or natural.

name: Apple Crumble Cocktail #2
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Easy to make and equally easy to drink.

name: Floridita Margarita
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A blush coloured, Margarita-style drink with a well-matched amalgamation of flavours.

name: Fly Like a Butterfly
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This light, aromatic, sweet and sour beauty has a grown-up, quinine-rich flavour but lacks the 'sting like a bee' finish.

name: Flying Dutchman
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Martini with more than a hint of orange.

name: Flying Grasshopper
ingredients: ¾ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
¾ shot De Kuyper Green Crème de Menthe Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
garnish: Powdered sugar & chocolate powder rim, plus float tip of mint sprig
comment:
A a href="/cocktails/recipe/2674/grasshopper">Grasshopper with a splash of vodka, this creamy after dinner cocktail is all the better for that vodka.

We also like, indeed are undecided if we prefer, this simpler but more alcoholic and calorific recipe: 1 vodka, ¾ green crème de menthe, ¾ white crème de menthe and 1 single cream.

Whichever recipe, this after-dinner cocktail is minty fresh with indulgent chocolate - reminiscent of a choc mint ice-cream.

name: Flying Tigre Coctel
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
⅛ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light, aromatic and complex - one to sip.

name: Fog Cutter #1
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
½ shot Giffard Sirop de Orgeat (Almond) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE first 6 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. FLOAT sherry on top of drink and serve without straws.
comment: Don't be fooled by the innocuous colour. This long, fruity drink packs a serious kick.

name: Forbidden Fruits
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: MUDDLE berries in base of shaker. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with ginger beer.
comment: Long and fruity with something of a bite.

name: Four W Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The oomph of rum, the sourness of grapefruit and the richness of maple syrup, all aromatised by bitters.

name: Frankenjack Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Dry and sophisticated.

name: Free Town
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
2 dash Peychaud's Aromatic Bitters Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Great for sipping after dinner.

name: French 76
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with champagne.
comment: A Vodka Sour topped with champagne. Works well.

name: French Bison-Tini
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A French Martini with the distinctive taste of Żubrówka.

name: French Martini
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Raspberry and pineapple laced with vodka. Easy drinking and very fruity.

name: French Mule
ingredients: 1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer, stir and serve with straws.
comment: This French answer to the vodka based Moscow Mule uses cognac to make a more flavoursome, long, refreshing drink.

name: French Spring Punch
ingredients: ½ shot Lejay Creme de Framboise (raspberry) Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with champagne and serve with straws.
comment: Not as popular as the Russian Spring Punch but still a modern day London classic.

name: French Tear #1
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light, flavoursome, easy drinking. Altogether very gluggable.

name: Frida's Brow
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy, sweetened tequila with hints of chocolate.

name: Apple Martini (simple)
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This is subtitled 'simple' for good reason but, if freshly pressed juice is used, it's as good if not better than other Apple Martini recipes.

name: Frozen Margarita
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 6oz scoop of crushed ice. Serve heaped in the glass and with straws.
comment: Citrus freshness with the subtle agave of tequila served frozen.

name: Fruit and Nut Chocolate Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
½ shot Baileys Original Irish Cream liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Naughty but nice - one for confectionery lovers.

name: Fruit & Nut Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A rich Christmas pudding of a cocktail.

name: Fruit Tree Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Maraschino syrup (from cherry jar)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A restrained Papa Doble with apricot liqueur.

name: Full Circle
ingredients: ¾ shot Fresh pressed pineapple juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Fruity and easy drinking, yet with complexity from the gin.

name: Fu Manchu Daiquiri
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¼ shot Giffard Menthe Pastille white crème de menthe liqueur
¾ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Natural Daiquiri with a refreshing, clean, citrusy, minty edge.

name: Funky Monkey
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
¾ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
¾ shot Creme de cacao liqueur (white)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: Be sure to use a ripe or even over-ripe banana in this tropical style drink.

name: Gin & Sin
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This is one of those drinks that benefits from a little dilution to prevent the citrus and gin becoming too aggressive.

name: Gin Daisy
ingredients: ¼ shot Chartreuse Jaune (Yellow Chartreuse) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink with ice and serve with straws.
comment: If correctly made this serious, gin dominated cocktail should be blush, not pink.

name: Gin Fix
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink with ice and serve with straws.
comment: A Gin Sour served over crushed ice in a goblet.

name: Gin Fixed
ingredients: ¼ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink with ice and serve with straws.
comment: Sweet and sour with a spirity pineapple twang.

name: Apple Mojito
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise) mint in base of glass. Add other ingredients, half fill glass with crushed ice and CHURN (stir) with bar spoon. Fill glass to brim with more crushed ice and CHURN some more. Serve with straws.
comment: An enduring classic given a touch of apple. Those with a sweet tooth may want to add more apple liqueur or even a dash of sugar syrup.

name: Gin Fizz
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass (without ice). TOP with soda.
comment: Everyone has heard of this clean, refreshing, long drink but few have actually tried it.

name: Gin Garden
instructions: MUDDLE cucumber in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A veritable English shrubbery with flowers, fruit and vegetables flourishing in harmony.

name: Gin Genie
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint in base of shaker (just to bruise). Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: A fruit-led long drink for gin-loving Bowie fans.

name: Gin Gin Mule
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Three Cents Ginger Beer
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add next 4 ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with ginger beer.
comment: Fresh ginger, mint and the herbal notes from gin make this much more than just another take on the Moscow Mule.

name: Gin Sling
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first 3 ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda water.
comment: Sugar balances the citrus juice, the spirit fortifies and the carbonate lengthens.

name: Ginger & Lemongrass Martini
ingredients: ¼ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
instructions: MUDDLE ginger and lemongrass in base of shaker. Add other ingredients and STIR until honey dissolves. SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Consider infusing the lemongrass in gin instead of muddling.

name: Gin-Ger & Tonic
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker, add gin and sugar, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with tonic water.
comment: A dry, refreshing long drink for those that like their G&Ts gingered.

name: Ginger Cosmo
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into glass.
comment: Just what it says on the tin - your everyday Cosmo given extra vitality courtesy of a hint of ginger spice.

name: Ginger Margarita
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Margarita spiced with ginger.

name: Ginger Cocktail
ingredients: ¾ shot Stone's Original Green Ginger Wine
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This Martini may be served chilled but its flavour is distinctly warming.

name: Ginger Mojito
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add mint and lightly MUDDLE (just to bruise). Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice. TOP with ginger ale.
comment: A spiced variation on the classic Mojito.

name: Gin-Ger Tom
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: MUDDLE ginger in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice filled glass.
comment: A Tom Collins with lime and ginger - very refreshing.

name: Giuseppe's Habit
ingredients: ¾ shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
instructions: Spray the oils from the two lemon zest twists into the cocktail shaker, wipe them around the rim of the glass and drop them into the shaker, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An intriguing drink that combines hazelnut, orange, apple, aniseed and peppermint.

name: Give me a Dime
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Creamy, sweet and tasty.

name: Godfrey
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¼ shot Lejay Creme de Mure (Blackberry) Liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE blackberries in base if shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Well balanced with a rich blackberry flavour.

name: Georgetown Punch
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Goslings Black Seal Rum
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A Tiki-style, fruity rum punch.

name: Apple Pie Cocktail
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: There's a good hit of cinnamon in this apple pie.

name: Golden Dawn
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
⅛ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: SHAKE first five ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. Carefully POUR grenadine into centre of drink so that it sinks to create a sunrise effect.
comment: Although it spoils the sunrise effect, this drink is less tart if the syrup lying on the bottom is stirred into the drink (or, better, included when shaking).

name: Golden Fizz #2
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
1 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR honey with gin in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add next three ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with lemonade.
comment: More cloudy white than golden but a pleasant, refreshing long drink all the same.

name: Golden Girl
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
1 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This appropriately named velvety drink is a refined dessert in a glass.

name: Golden Retriever
ingredients: 1 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: This powerful straw yellow cocktail offers a myriad of flavours. Benefits from the dilution of a long stir and/or the addition of a dash of water.

name: Golf Cocktail
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A 'wet' Martini with bitters.

name: Cadillac Margarita (AKA Grand Margarita)
ingredients: 1½ shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A balanced (far from sweet) and flavoursome Margarita with the rich cognac and orange notes of Grand Marnier adding to this drinks depth of flavour.

name: Grand Mimosa
ingredients: ½ shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: POUR half the champagne into ice-filled glass (preferably a chunk of block ice), then the orange juice, orange liqueur and then the rest of the champagne.
comment: As the name suggests, the orange of Grand Marnier heavily influences this drink. Basically a Mimosa or a Buck's Fizz (orange juice and champagne) with added oomph.

name: Granny's
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apple, rum and cinnamon were made for each other.

name: Grape Delight
ingredients: ½ shot Rutte Sloe Gin liqueur
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add rest of ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: This rust coloured drink is fruity and delicate.

name: Grape Effect
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Delicately flavoured and heavily laced with rum.

name: Grape Cocktail #1
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Simple but remarkably tasty.

name: Apple Spritz
ingredients: ¾ shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
¼ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
instructions: POUR first 2 ingredients into glass then TOP with champagne.
comment: Sweet, fruity champagne.

name: Grapefruit Daiquiri #1
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1½ shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
¾ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: The flavours of rum and grapefruit combine perfectly - clean and fresh.

name: Grapple Martini
ingredients: ¾ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A rounded, fruity Martini-style drink.

name: Grassy Finnish
ingredients: ¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water) (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE lemongrass in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Like Finland, this drink is clean, green, wooded and safe, but deep down there's plenty of spice.

name: Green Apple & Cucumber Martini
ingredients: ⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: MUDDLE cucumber in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Archetypal English flavours. Clean, green and refreshing.

name: Green Hornet
ingredients: ⅛ shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A surprisingly palatable and balanced shot.

name: Green Tea Cocktail #1
ingredients: ⅛ shot Giffard Menthe Pastille white crème de menthe liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: It's green and, although it doesn't actually contain any tea, has something of the flavour of alcoholic peppermint tea.

name: Greta Garbo
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A Daiquiri with delicate notes of maraschino and anise.

name: Gulf Coast Sex on the Beach
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
¾ shot Giffard Banane du Brésil crème de banane liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: Golden tan in colour and tropical in flavour, complete with frothy top.

name: Gusto
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
instructions: MUDDLE grapes in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A pleasing long drink flavoured with apple, grape and tequila.

name: Gypsy Cocktail
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
1 shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: MUDDLE rosemary and raisins in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Jason's original recipe called for raisin infused gin and I'd recommend you make this drink that way if time permits.

name: Gypsy Queen #2
ingredients: ¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Tangy, herbal, predominantly orange and not overly sweet.

name: Hakkatini
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Balanced bitter sweet orange and apple.

name: Hanky Panky Cocktail
ingredients: ⅛ shot Fernet Branca digestive bitter liqueur
¼ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment:
This is basically a Sweet Martini influenced by the addition of bittersweet and aromatic Fernet Branca. Although not classically used in the original recipe, the Hanky Panky is greatly improved by the addition of a dash of freshly squeezed orange juice. This slightly clouds the appearance of the drink but the hint of fruit freshens and balances the heavy Fernet Branca.

The addition of orange juice crept into our recipe for the Hanky Panky around 2010 but sadly we did not record who or what occasion inspired this variation.

name: Hard Lemonade
ingredients: 1 shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda and serve with straws.
comment: Refreshing lemonade with a kick. Great for a hot afternoon.

name: The Harlem
ingredients: ¼ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Soft and fruity. Careful, it's harder than you think.

name: Harvard
ingredients: Top up with Soda from siphon
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass. TOP with a shot or so of chilled soda.
comment: Old-school, but approachable so. Dry and herbal. A great aperitif.

name: Havana Cobbler
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1 shot Warre's Otima 10 Year Old Tawny Port
½ shot Stone's Original Green Ginger Wine
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: An unusual, spiced, Daiquiri-like drink.

name: Havana Special
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Luxardo Maraschino Originale Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Daiquiri-like without the sourness. Fragrant and all too easy to drink.

name: Hawaiian Cocktail
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Disaronno Originale Amaretto liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sweet, tangy and fruity.

name: Hawaiian Cosmopolitan
ingredients: ½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Fresh, tangy and distinctly tropical.

name: Hawaiian Martini
ingredients: ½ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
½ shot Martini Rosso sweet vermouth
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: An aptly named fruity twist on the classic Martini.

name: Hazelnut Alexander
ingredients: ½ shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker. DRY SHAKE (without ice) and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Great twist on a classic - the use of bitters is inspired.

name: Applesinth
ingredients: 1 shot La Fée Parisienne Absinthe Superieure
1 shot Berentzen Apfel Korn (apple schnapps) liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice.
comment: Hints of apple and liquorice combine to make a very moreish cocktail.

name: The Hive
ingredients: 2 shot Freshly squeezed pink grapefruit juice
instructions: STIR honey with vodka until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Sour grapefruit balanced by sweet honey.

name: Hoa Sua
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
⅛ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Light and easy drinking - the rum flavour shines through.

name: Honey Apple Cocktail
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A classically Polish blend of flavours.

name: Honey Bee
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR honey with rum in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Honey balances lemon juice in this rum-based cocktail.

name: Honey Berry Sour
ingredients: ¾ shot Lejay Creme de Cassis de Dijon liqueur (18%)
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: More sweet than sour but berry nice.

name: Honey Limeaid (Non-alcoholic)
ingredients: Top up with Soda (club soda) or sparkling water
instructions: Stir honey with lime juice in base of shaker until honey dissolves. SHAKE with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. TOP with soda.
comment: A refreshing Mexican variation on Real Lemonade.

name: Honey Vodka Sour
ingredients: ½ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A vodka sour with true honey character.

name: Honey Wall
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1¼ shot Gabriel Boudier Dark Creme de Cacao Liqueur
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: Strong, rich and chocolatey.

name: Appily Married
instructions: STIR ingredients in base of shaker until honey dissolves. SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Apple and honey are indeed a marriage made in heaven, especially when laced with grainy vodka notes.

name: The Honeysuckle Orchard
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: STIR honey with vodka in base of shaker until honey dissolves. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: A back to nature Polish Martini - all the better for it.

name: Honolulu
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
¼ shot Giffard Sirop Grenadine (Grenadine Syrup)
instructions: BLEND all ingredients with 12oz scoop of crushed ice and serve with straws.
comment: Cooling, fruity and pretty light on alcohol - perfect for a hot afternoon in Honolulu.

name: Hoopla
ingredients: 1 shot De Kuyper Triple Sec Liqueur
¾ shot Martini Extra Dry vermouth
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Not far removed from a Sidecar.

name: Hop Toad #1
ingredients: 1¼ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
1¼ shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Resembles an apricot Daiquiri that's heavy on the lime yet balanced.

name: Hop Toad #2
ingredients: 1¾ shot Bacardi Ocho Anos Gran Reserva Rum
1 shot De Kuyper Apricot Brandy Liqueur
¾ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
½ shot Chilled water (omit if using wet ice)
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Alcoholic apricot jam with a lovely twang of aged rum.

name: Hornitos Lau
ingredients: 2 shot Patrón Reposado (orange seal) 100% agave tequila
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Lightly MUDDLE mint (just to bruise) in base of shaker. Add other ingredients, SHAKE with ice and strain into glass filled with crushed ice. CHURN (stir) drink and add more crushed ice so drink meets rim of glass.
comment: Jaspar recommends making a batch in their glasses and refreezing them with the straws already in the glass, like the old colonels and their julep freezers in Kentucky.

name: Hot Buttered Rum Cocktail
ingredients: 2 shot Bacardi Carta Oro Superior Gold Rum
instructions: Place bar spoon loaded with honey in warmed glass. Add other ingredients and STIR until honey and butter are dissolved.
garnish: Cinnamon stick & lemon slice (studded with cloves)
comment:
In his The Fine Art of Mixing Drinks, David Embury says, "The Hot Spiced Rum is bad enough, but the lump of butter is the final insult. It blends with the hot rum just about as satisfactorily as warm olive oil blends with champagne!" 

It's rare for us to question Embury but we rather like this slightly oily, warming, spicy toddy. This drink is even better when you use heated dry cider in place of boiling water.

name: Hot Grog
ingredients: ¼ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
instructions: Place bar spoon loaded with honey in warmed glass. Add other ingredients and STIR until honey dissolves.
comment: Warming, honeyed, pungent rum with a hint of lime.

name: Hot Red Blooded Frenchman
ingredients: 1 shot Grand Marnier Cordon Rouge Liqueur
½ shot Freshly squeezed orange juice
½ shot Freshly squeezed lemon juice
¼ shot Sugar syrup (2 sugar to 1 water)
instructions: Place bar spoon in warmed glass. Add other ingredients and STIR.
comment: Warm, fruity red wine - great on a cold night.

name: Hot Tub
ingredients: Top up with Martini Prosecco D.O.C.
instructions: SHAKE first three ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass. TOP with prosecco.
comment: Basically a French Martini with bubbles.

name: Hurricane #1
ingredients: 1½ shot Bacardi Carta Blanca Superior White Rum (37.5%)
½ shot Freshly squeezed lime juice
¼ shot Giffard Passion Fruit (Fruit de la Passion) Syrup
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass.
comment: A strong, tangy, refreshing drink packed with fruit and laced with rum.

name: I B Damm'd
ingredients: ¼ shot Original Peachtree Liqueur Buy from amazon
instructions: SHAKE all ingredients with ice and fine strain into chilled glass.
comment: Subtle combination of fruit and floral flavours.

name: Ice Maiden
ingredients: ¾ shot Sauvignon blanc white wine
½ shot Chilled water (reduce if wet ice)
instructions: STIR all ingredients with ice and strain into chilled glass.
comment: A subtle Martini with the honeyed flavours of icewine melding with botanicals in the gin and balanced by the acidity of the white wine.
